[31m+ /*[39m
[31m+  * © 2026 Heady™Systems Inc. PROPRIETARY AND CONFIDENTIAL.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * heady-api-gateway-v2.js[39m
[31m+  * ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Heady™ API Gateway v2 — unified edge for all nine Heady™ domains.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * What this replaces / improves[39m
[31m+  * ──────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+  *   • headyapi-core (empty shell — only express dep)[39m
[31m+  *   • source-map.json "notes": "gateway needs auth layer"[39m
[31m+  *   • alive-software-architecture.md API surface (partial only)[39m
[31m+  *   • heady-registry.json services[headyapi] hard-coded URLs[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Key capabilities[39m
[31m+  * ────────────────[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ API versioning  (/api/v1/* legacy, /api/v2/* current)[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ JWT + API-key dual authentication[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Per-service, per-user rate limiting (sliding window, in-memory)[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ CORS for all 9 Heady™ domains + localhost dev[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ SSE (Server-Sent Events) endpoint for real-time pipeline updates[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Request validation middleware (JSON Schema via fast validator)[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Proxy routing through HeadyServiceMesh (circuit-breaking, LB)[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Observability: trace headers, Prometheus metrics, structured logs[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Admin router (/api/v1/admin/*) — gated by HMAC admin token[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Health / readiness probes (/health, /ready)[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ GCP Pub/Sub webhook ingest (/webhooks/pubsub)[39m
[31m+  *   ✓ Graceful shutdown with drain period[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Versioning policy[39m
[31m+  * ──────────────────[39m
[31m+  *   /api/v1/*  — Stable, maintained for backward compat. No new features.[39m
[31m+  *   /api/v2/*  — Current, actively developed. New integrations go here.[39m
[31m+  *   /api/v3/*  — Reserved for future breaking changes.[39m
[31m+  *   /api/vN/*  — Unrecognised version → 404 with upgrade instructions.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Nine Heady™ domains handled[39m
[31m+  * ───────────────────────────[39m
[31m+  *   headyme.com, headysystems.com, headyapi.com, headyconnection.org,[39m
[31m+  *   headybuddy.org, headymcp.com, headyio.com, headybot.com, heady-ai.com[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Auth schemes[39m
[31m+  * ─────────────[39m
[31m+  *   Bearer <JWT>   — HS256 signed with gateway.jwtSecret (config server)[39m
[31m+  *   X-Heady™-Key    — SHA-256 HMAC API key (issued per service/user)[39m
[31m+  *   X-Admin-Token  — Admin HMAC token (heady-service-mesh compatible)[39m
[31m+  *   Public routes  — explicitly whitelisted, no auth required[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Rate limits (default, all configurable via config server)[39m
[31m+  * ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+  *   Anonymous    :   60 req / 60 s per IP[39m
[31m+  *   Authenticated: 1000 req / 60 s per identity[39m
[31m+  *   Admin routes :  200 req / 60 s per identity[39m
[31m+  *   Pipeline SSE :   10 concurrent streams per identity[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Port[39m
[31m+  * ────[39m
[31m+  *   Reads from config server 'gateway.port' (default 8080 for Cloud Run).[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Usage[39m
[31m+  * ─────[39m
[31m+  *   const { createGateway } = require('./heady-api-gateway-v2');[39m
[31m+  *   const gw = createGateway();[39m
[31m+  *   await gw.start();[39m
[31m+  *   // → Listening on port 8080[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  *   // Programmatic (embed in existing Express app):[39m
[31m+  *   app.use(gw.router());[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ 'use strict';[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ const { PHI_TIMING } = require('../shared/phi-math');[39m
[31m+ const logger = require('../../shared/logger').createChildLogger('heady-api-gateway-v2');[39m
[31m+ const http         = require('http');[39m
[31m+ const https        = require('https');[39m
[31m+ const { URL }      = require('url');[39m
[31m+ const crypto       = require('crypto');[39m
[31m+ const EventEmitter = require('events');[39m
[31m+ const { pipeline } = require('stream');[39m
[31m+ const logger = require('../utils/logger');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── φ constant ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const PHI = 1.6180339887;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── All 9 Heady™ domains + canonical www variants ─────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const HEADY_DOMAINS = Object.freeze([[39m
[31m+   'headyme.com',       'www.headyme.com',[39m
[31m+   'headysystems.com',  'www.headysystems.com',[39m
[31m+   'headyapi.com',      'www.headyapi.com',[39m
[31m+   'headyconnection.org', 'www.headyconnection.org',[39m
[31m+   'headybuddy.org',    'www.headybuddy.org',[39m
[31m+   'headymcp.com',      'www.headymcp.com',[39m
[31m+   'headyio.com',       'www.headyio.com',[39m
[31m+   'headybot.com',      'www.headybot.com',[39m
[31m+   'heady-ai.com',       'www.heady-ai.com',[39m
[31m+   // Dev / local[39m
[31m+   '0.0.0.0',[39m
[31m+   process.env.REMOTE_HOST || '0.0.0.0',[39m
[31m+ ]);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Supported API versions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const SUPPORTED_VERSIONS = Object.freeze(['v1', 'v2']);[39m
[31m+ const CURRENT_VERSION    = 'v2';[39m
[31m+ const LEGACY_VERSION     = 'v1';[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Public (no-auth) routes by version ──────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const PUBLIC_ROUTES = Object.freeze({[39m
[31m+   v1: [[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v1/health',[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v1/ready',[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v1/version',[39m
[31m+     'POST /api/v1/auth/login',[39m
[31m+     'POST /api/v1/auth/refresh',[39m
[31m+     'POST /webhooks/pubsub',[39m
[31m+   ],[39m
[31m+   v2: [[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v2/health',[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v2/ready',[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v2/version',[39m
[31m+     'POST /api/v2/auth/login',[39m
[31m+     'POST /api/v2/auth/refresh',[39m
[31m+     'GET /api/v2/obs/metrics',     // Prometheus scrape[39m
[31m+     'POST /webhooks/pubsub',[39m
[31m+   ],[39m
[31m+ });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Rate limit tiers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const RATE_TIERS = Object.freeze({[39m
[31m+   anonymous:     { windowMs: 60_000, maxRequests: 60   },[39m
[31m+   authenticated: { windowMs: 60_000, maxRequests: 1000 },[39m
[31m+   admin:         { windowMs: 60_000, maxRequests: 200  },[39m
[31m+   pipeline_sse:  { windowMs: 60_000, maxStreams: 10    },[39m
[31m+ });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ //  In-memory rate limiter (sliding window, no external deps)[39m
[31m+ // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ class RateLimiter {[39m
[31m+   constructor() {[39m
[31m+     // key → { timestamps: number[], tier: string }[39m
[31m+     this._windows = new Map();[39m
[31m+     // Prune every φ × 60 s[39m
[31m+     this._pruneTimer = setInterval(() => this._prune(), Math.round(PHI * 60_000));[39m
[31m+     if (this._pruneTimer.unref) this._pruneTimer.unref();[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Check and record a request attempt.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} key        — identity (IP or user ID)[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} tier       — 'anonymous' | 'authenticated' | 'admin'[39m
[31m+    * @returns {{ allowed: boolean, remaining: number, resetMs: number }}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   check(key, tier = 'anonymous') {[39m
[31m+     const config  = RATE_TIERS[tier] || RATE_TIERS.anonymous;[39m
[31m+     const now     = Date.now();[39m
[31m+     const entry   = this._windows.get(key) || { timestamps: [] };[39m
[31m+     const cutoff  = now - config.windowMs;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Slide window[39m
[31m+     entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => t > cutoff);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     const allowed   = entry.timestamps.length < config.maxRequests;[39m
[31m+     if (allowed) entry.timestamps.push(now);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     this._windows.set(key, entry);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       allowed,[39m
[31m+       remaining: Math.max(0, config.maxRequests - entry.timestamps.length),[39m
[31m+       resetMs:   entry.timestamps.length ? (entry.timestamps[0] + config.windowMs - now) : 0,[39m
[31m+       limit:     config.maxRequests,[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _prune() {[39m
[31m+     const now = Date.now();[39m
[31m+     for (const [key, entry] of this._windows) {[39m
[31m+       // Remove windows older than the longest tier window[39m
[31m+       if (entry.timestamps.every((t) => now - t > 120_000)) {[39m
[31m+         this._windows.delete(key);[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   stop() {[39m
[31m+     clearInterval(this._pruneTimer);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ //  JWT helpers (HS256, no external deps)[39m
[31m+ // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ function base64urlEncode(buf) {[39m
[31m+   return buf.toString('base64').replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=/g, '');[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ function base64urlDecode(str) {[39m
[31m+   str = str.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');[39m
[31m+   while (str.length % 4) str += '=';[39m
[31m+   return Buffer.from(str, 'base64');[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Sign a JWT with HS256.[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} payload[39m
[31m+  * @param {string} secret[39m
[31m+  * @param {number} [expiresInS=3600][39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function signJwt(payload, secret, expiresInS = 3600) {[39m
[31m+   const header  = base64urlEncode(Buffer.from(JSON.stringify({ alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' })));[39m
[31m+   const body    = base64urlEncode(Buffer.from(JSON.stringify({[39m
[31m+     ...payload,[39m
[31m+     iat: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000),[39m
[31m+     exp: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + expiresInS,[39m
[31m+   })));[39m
[31m+   const sig = base64urlEncode([39m
[31m+     crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(`${header}.${body}`).digest()[39m
[31m+   );[39m
[31m+   return `${header}.${body}.${sig}`;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Verify a JWT. Returns decoded payload or throws.[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function verifyJwt(token, secret) {[39m
[31m+   const parts = token.split('.');[39m
[31m+   if (parts.length !== 3) throw new Error('Invalid JWT format.');[39m
[31m+   const [header, body, sig] = parts;[39m
[31m+   const expected = base64urlEncode([39m
[31m+     crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(`${header}.${body}`).digest()[39m
[31m+   );[39m
[31m+   if (!crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(sig), Buffer.from(expected))) {[39m
[31m+     throw new Error('JWT signature invalid.');[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   const payload = JSON.parse(base64urlDecode(body).toString('utf8'));[39m
[31m+   if (payload.exp && payload.exp < Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)) {[39m
[31m+     throw new Error('JWT expired.');[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   return payload;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Verify an API key (HMAC-SHA256: key = HMAC(secret, keyId)).[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function verifyApiKey(key, secret) {[39m
[31m+   // Key format: <keyId>.<hmac>[39m
[31m+   const sep = key.lastIndexOf('.');[39m
[31m+   if (sep === -1) throw new Error('Invalid API key format.');[39m
[31m+   const keyId  = key.substring(0, sep);[39m
[31m+   const hmac   = key.substring(sep + 1);[39m
[31m+   const expected = crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(keyId).digest('hex');[39m
[31m+   if (!crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(hmac), Buffer.from(expected))) {[39m
[31m+     throw new Error('Invalid API key.');[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   return { keyId };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ //  HeadyApiGatewayV2[39m
[31m+ // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ class HeadyApiGatewayV2 extends EventEmitter {[39m
[31m+   constructor(opts = {}) {[39m
[31m+     super();[39m
[31m+     this._opts = {[39m
[31m+       port:           opts.port           || parseInt(process.env.PORT || '8080', 10),[39m
[31m+       jwtSecret:      opts.jwtSecret      || process.env.JWT_SECRET    || '',[39m
[31m+       apiKeySecret:   opts.apiKeySecret   || process.env.API_KEY_SECRET || '',[39m
[31m+       adminTokenHash: opts.adminTokenHash || process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN_HASH || '',[39m
[31m+       trustProxy:     opts.trustProxy     !== false,[39m
[31m+       enableCors:     opts.enableCors     !== false,[39m
[31m+       enableRateLimit: opts.enableRateLimit !== false,[39m
[31m+       enableAuth:     opts.enableAuth     !== false,[39m
[31m+       serviceName:    opts.serviceName    || 'headyapi',[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     this._rateLimiter = new RateLimiter();[39m
[31m+     this._sseClients  = new Map();   // traceId → res[39m
[31m+     this._server      = null;[39m
[31m+     this._started     = false;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Lazy-load singleton collaborators to avoid circular requires at module load[39m
[31m+     this._mesh  = null;   // HeadyServiceMesh singleton[39m
[31m+     this._obs   = null;   // HeadyObservability singleton[39m
[31m+     this._cfg   = null;   // ConfigServer singleton[39m
[31m+     this._bus   = null;   // HeadyEventBus singleton[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Lazy singleton accessors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   get mesh() {[39m
[31m+     if (!this._mesh) {[39m
[31m+       try { this._mesh = require('./heady-service-mesh').getServiceMesh(); }[39m
[31m+       catch (e) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('Unexpected error', { error: e.message, stack: e.stack });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return this._mesh;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   get obs() {[39m
[31m+     if (!this._obs) {[39m
[31m+       try { this._obs = require('./heady-observability').getObservability({ service: this._opts.serviceName }); }[39m
[31m+       catch (e) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('Unexpected error', { error: e.message, stack: e.stack });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return this._obs;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   get cfg() {[39m
[31m+     if (!this._cfg) {[39m
[31m+       try { this._cfg = require('./heady-config-server').getConfigServer(); }[39m
[31m+       catch (e) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('Unexpected error', { error: e.message, stack: e.stack });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return this._cfg;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   get bus() {[39m
[31m+     if (!this._bus) {[39m
[31m+       try { this._bus = require('./heady-event-bus').getEventBus(); }[39m
[31m+       catch (e) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('Unexpected error', { error: e.message, stack: e.stack });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return this._bus;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   async start() {[39m
[31m+     if (this._started) return this;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+     const app = express();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     if (this._opts.trustProxy) app.set('trust proxy', 1);[39m
[31m+     app.set('x-powered-by', false);[39m
[31m+     app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));[39m
[31m+     app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: '10mb' }));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Observability middleware (first) ────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     if (this.obs) app.use(this.obs.requestMiddleware());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── CORS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     if (this._opts.enableCors) app.use(this._corsMiddleware());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Security headers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     app.use(this._securityHeaders());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Version router ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     app.use('/api', this._versionRouter());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Webhook ingress ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     app.use('/webhooks', this._webhookRouter());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Health probes (no version prefix — Cloud Run requires /) ───────────[39m
[31m+     app.get('/health', (_req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ok', service: this._opts.serviceName, ts: Date.now() }));[39m
[31m+     app.get('/ready',  (_req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ready', service: this._opts.serviceName }));[39m
[31m+     app.get('/',       (_req, res) => res.json({[39m
[31m+       name:     'Heady™ API Gateway',[39m
[31m+       version:  CURRENT_VERSION,[39m
[31m+       docs:     'https://headyapi.com/docs',[39m
[31m+       github:   'https://github.com/heady-project/headyapi-core',[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Observability error middleware (last) ───────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     if (this.obs) app.use(this.obs.errorMiddleware());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Unhandled routes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     app.use((req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.status(404).json({[39m
[31m+         error:   'Not Found',[39m
[31m+         path:    req.path,[39m
[31m+         hint:    `API routes live under /api/${CURRENT_VERSION}/. Check the docs at https://headyapi.com/docs`,[39m
[31m+         traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId || null,[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     this._server = http.createServer(app);[39m
[31m+     const port   = this.cfg ? this.cfg.get('gateway.port', this._opts.port) : this._opts.port;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {[39m
[31m+       this._server.listen(port, '0.0.0.0', (err) => {[39m
[31m+         if (err) return reject(err);[39m
[31m+         resolve();[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     this._started = true;[39m
[31m+     this.emit('gateway:started', { port });[39m
[31m+     logger.info(`Listening on port ${port}`);[39m
[31m+     return this;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   async stop() {[39m
[31m+     if (!this._server) return;[39m
[31m+     // Drain SSE clients[39m
[31m+     for (const [, res] of this._sseClients) {[39m
[31m+       try { res.end(); } catch (e) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('Unexpected error', { error: e.message, stack: e.stack });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     this._sseClients.clear();[39m
[31m+     this._rateLimiter.stop();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     await new Promise((resolve) => this._server.close(resolve));[39m
[31m+     this._started = false;[39m
[31m+     this.emit('gateway:stopped');[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── CORS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _corsMiddleware() {[39m
[31m+     return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       const origin = req.headers.origin || '';[39m
[31m+       const allowed = HEADY_DOMAINS.some((d) => origin.includes(d)) || !origin;[39m
[31m+       // SECURITY: Never send wildcard '*' — echo back the specific allowed origin[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', allowed && origin ? origin : 'null');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', [[39m
[31m+         'Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'X-Heady-Key',[39m
[31m+         'X-Heady-Trace-Id', 'X-Heady-Span-Id', 'X-Heady-Service',[39m
[31m+         'X-Admin-Token', 'Cache-Control',[39m
[31m+       ].join(', '));[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', 'X-Heady-Trace-Id, X-Heady-Span-Id');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(Math.round(PHI * 3600))); // ~5820 s[39m
[31m+       if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') return res.sendStatus(204);[39m
[31m+       next();[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Security headers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _securityHeaders() {[39m
[31m+     return (_req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-Heady-Gateway', `v${CURRENT_VERSION}`);[39m
[31m+       next();[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Version router ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _versionRouter() {[39m
[31m+     const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+     const router  = express.Router();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Version detection[39m
[31m+     router.use('/:version/*', (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       const { version } = req.params;[39m
[31m+       if (!SUPPORTED_VERSIONS.includes(version)) {[39m
[31m+         return res.status(404).json({[39m
[31m+           error:     `API version '${version}' is not supported.`,[39m
[31m+           supported: SUPPORTED_VERSIONS,[39m
[31m+           current:   CURRENT_VERSION,[39m
[31m+           upgrade:   `https://headyapi.com/docs/migration/${version}-to-${CURRENT_VERSION}`,[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       req.apiVersion = version;[39m
[31m+       next();[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Mount versioned routers[39m
[31m+     router.use('/v1', this._authMiddleware(), this._rateLimitMiddleware('authenticated'), this._v1Router());[39m
[31m+     router.use('/v2', this._authMiddleware(), this._rateLimitMiddleware('authenticated'), this._v2Router());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     return router;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Auth middleware ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _authMiddleware() {[39m
[31m+     return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       if (!this._opts.enableAuth) { req.auth = { anonymous: true }; return next(); }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       const version  = req.apiVersion || 'v2';[39m
[31m+       const routeKey = `${req.method} ${req.path}`;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Check if route is public[39m
[31m+       const publicRoutes = [...(PUBLIC_ROUTES[version] || []), ...(PUBLIC_ROUTES.v2)];[39m
[31m+       const isPublic = publicRoutes.some((r) => {[39m
[31m+         const [m, p] = r.split(' ');[39m
[31m+         return (m === req.method || m === '*') && req.originalUrl.startsWith(p);[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       if (isPublic) { req.auth = { anonymous: true }; return next(); }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Try JWT[39m
[31m+       const authHeader = req.headers.authorization || '';[39m
[31m+       if (authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {[39m
[31m+         const token = authHeader.slice(7);[39m
[31m+         const secret = this.cfg ? this.cfg.get('gateway.jwtSecret', this._opts.jwtSecret) : this._opts.jwtSecret;[39m
[31m+         if (!secret) {[39m
[31m+           return res.status(500).json({ error: 'JWT secret not configured. Set gateway.jwtSecret.' });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           const payload = verifyJwt(token, secret);[39m
[31m+           req.auth = { type: 'jwt', userId: payload.sub, roles: payload.roles || [], payload };[39m
[31m+           return next();[39m
[31m+         } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+           return res.status(401).json({ error: 'JWT invalid.', detail: err.message, traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Try API key[39m
[31m+       const apiKey = req.headers['x-heady-key'] || '';[39m
[31m+       if (apiKey) {[39m
[31m+         const secret = this.cfg ? this.cfg.get('gateway.jwtSecret', this._opts.apiKeySecret) : this._opts.apiKeySecret;[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           const { keyId } = verifyApiKey(apiKey, secret || 'heady-default-key-secret-change-in-prod');[39m
[31m+           req.auth = { type: 'apikey', keyId, roles: ['service'] };[39m
[31m+           return next();[39m
[31m+         } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+           return res.status(401).json({ error: 'API key invalid.', detail: err.message, traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Admin token (checked separately from regular auth)[39m
[31m+       const adminToken = req.headers['x-admin-token'] || '';[39m
[31m+       if (adminToken && req.path.startsWith('/admin')) {[39m
[31m+         const expectedHash = this.cfg[39m
[31m+           ? this.cfg.get('gateway.adminTokenHash', this._opts.adminTokenHash)[39m
[31m+           : this._opts.adminTokenHash;[39m
[31m+         const actualHash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(adminToken).digest('hex');[39m
[31m+         if (expectedHash && crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(actualHash), Buffer.from(expectedHash))) {[39m
[31m+           req.auth = { type: 'admin', roles: ['admin', 'service'] };[39m
[31m+           return next();[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Admin token invalid.' });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // No credentials provided[39m
[31m+       return res.status(401).json({[39m
[31m+         error:   'Authentication required.',[39m
[31m+         schemes: ['Bearer <JWT>', 'X-Heady-Key: <api-key>'],[39m
[31m+         docs:    'https://headyapi.com/docs/auth',[39m
[31m+         traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId || null,[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Rate limit middleware ──────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _rateLimitMiddleware(defaultTier = 'authenticated') {[39m
[31m+     return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       if (!this._opts.enableRateLimit) return next();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       const tier     = req.auth?.roles?.includes('admin') ? 'admin' : (req.auth?.anonymous ? 'anonymous' : defaultTier);[39m
[31m+       const identity = req.auth?.userId || req.auth?.keyId || req.ip || 'unknown';[39m
[31m+       const result   = this._rateLimiter.check(identity, tier);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-RateLimit-Limit',     String(result.limit));[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-RateLimit-Remaining', String(result.remaining));[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-RateLimit-Reset',     String(Math.ceil(result.resetMs / 1000)));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       if (!result.allowed) {[39m
[31m+         this.obs?.metrics.counter('heady_http_requests_total').inc({[39m
[31m+           service: this._opts.serviceName, method: req.method, path: req.path, status_code: '429',[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+         return res.status(429).json({[39m
[31m+           error:      'Rate limit exceeded.',[39m
[31m+           tier,[39m
[31m+           resetInMs:  result.resetMs,[39m
[31m+           retryAfter: Math.ceil(result.resetMs / 1000),[39m
[31m+           traceId:    req.headyTrace?.traceId || null,[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       next();[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── v1 Router (legacy, read-only stable surface) ──────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _v1Router() {[39m
[31m+     const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+     const router  = express.Router();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Health[39m
[31m+     router.get('/health',  (_req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ok',   version: 'v1', ts: Date.now() }));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/ready',   (_req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ready', version: 'v1' }));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/version', (_req, res) => res.json({[39m
[31m+       current:  CURRENT_VERSION,[39m
[31m+       version:  'v1',[39m
[31m+       status:   'legacy',[39m
[31m+       sunset:   '2027-01-01',[39m
[31m+       docs:     'https://headyapi.com/docs/v1',[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Pipeline run (v1 — proxied to v2 internally)[39m
[31m+     router.post('/pipeline/run', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/pipeline/run');[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Bees (v1 read-only)[39m
[31m+     router.get('/bees', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/bees');[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     router.get('/bees/:id', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', `/api/v2/bees/${req.params.id}`);[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Creative engine[39m
[31m+     router.post('/creative/generate', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/creative/generate');[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Vector memory (v1 — GET only)[39m
[31m+     router.get('/memory/query', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/memory/query');[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Deprecation warning header for ALL v1 routes[39m
[31m+     router.use((_req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Deprecation', 'true');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Sunset', 'Sat, 01 Jan 2027 00:00:00 GMT');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Link', '<https://headyapi.com/docs/migration/v1-to-v2>; rel="deprecation"');[39m
[31m+       next();[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     return router;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── v2 Router (current, all features) ────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _v2Router() {[39m
[31m+     const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+     const router  = express.Router();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Meta ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/health',  (_req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ok',    version: 'v2', ts: Date.now() }));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/ready',   (_req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ready', version: 'v2' }));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/version', (_req, res) => res.json({[39m
[31m+       name:     'Heady™ API Gateway',[39m
[31m+       current:  CURRENT_VERSION,[39m
[31m+       versions: SUPPORTED_VERSIONS,[39m
[31m+       docs:     'https://headyapi.com/docs',[39m
[31m+       email:    'eric@headyconnection.org',[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Auth ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/auth/login', express.json(), async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       const { userId, password } = req.body || {};[39m
[31m+       if (!userId) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'userId required.' });[39m
[31m+       // In production: validate against PostgreSQL users table[39m
[31m+       // For now: issue JWT with userId (password validation is caller's responsibility)[39m
[31m+       const secret = this.cfg ? this.cfg.get('gateway.jwtSecret', this._opts.jwtSecret) : this._opts.jwtSecret;[39m
[31m+       if (!secret) return res.status(500).json({ error: 'JWT secret not configured.' });[39m
[31m+       const token = signJwt({ sub: userId, roles: ['user'] }, secret, 3600);[39m
[31m+       res.json({ token, expiresIn: 3600, type: 'Bearer' });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     router.post('/auth/refresh', (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       const authHeader = req.headers.authorization || '';[39m
[31m+       if (!authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Bearer token required.' });[39m
[31m+       const secret = this.cfg ? this.cfg.get('gateway.jwtSecret', this._opts.jwtSecret) : this._opts.jwtSecret;[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const payload = verifyJwt(authHeader.slice(7), secret);[39m
[31m+         const newToken = signJwt({ sub: payload.sub, roles: payload.roles }, secret, 3600);[39m
[31m+         res.json({ token: newToken, expiresIn: 3600 });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(401).json({ error: err.message });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Pipeline ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/pipeline/run', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       const traceId = req.headyTrace?.traceId;[39m
[31m+       this.obs?.metrics.counter('heady_pipeline_runs_total').inc({ service: this._opts.serviceName, status: 'started' });[39m
[31m+       this.bus?.publish('heady:pipeline:run:created', { traceId, body: req.body, userId: req.auth?.userId });[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/pipeline/run');[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     router.get('/pipeline/runs/:runId', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', `/api/v2/pipeline/runs/${req.params.runId}`);[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     router.delete('/pipeline/runs/:runId', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', `/api/v2/pipeline/runs/${req.params.runId}`);[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Pipeline SSE stream ────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/pipeline/stream/:runId', (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       const { runId } = req.params;[39m
[31m+       const traceId  = req.headyTrace?.traceId || crypto.randomUUID();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');[39m
[31m+       res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no'); // disable Nginx buffering[39m
[31m+       res.flushHeaders();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       const clientKey = `${traceId}:${runId}`;[39m
[31m+       this._sseClients.set(clientKey, res);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       const sendEvent = (event, data) => {[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           res.write(`event: ${event}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`);[39m
[31m+         } catch (e) {[39m
[31m+           logger.error('Unexpected error', { error: e.message, stack: e.stack });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       sendEvent('connected', { runId, traceId, ts: Date.now() });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Subscribe to pipeline events for this runId[39m
[31m+       let unsubFn = null;[39m
[31m+       if (this.bus) {[39m
[31m+         unsubFn = this.bus.subscribe('heady:pipeline:run:*', (event) => {[39m
[31m+           if (event.data?.runId === runId || event.data?.traceId === traceId) {[39m
[31m+             sendEvent('pipeline:update', event.data);[39m
[31m+           }[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       req.on('close', () => {[39m
[31m+         this._sseClients.delete(clientKey);[39m
[31m+         if (unsubFn) unsubFn();[39m
[31m+         res.end();[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Heartbeat to keep connection alive (every φ × 10 s)[39m
[31m+       const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {[39m
[31m+         res.write(`: heartbeat ${Date.now()}\n\n`);[39m
[31m+       }, Math.round(PHI * 10_000));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       req.on('close', () => clearInterval(heartbeat));[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Bees ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/bees',        async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/bees'));[39m
[31m+     router.post('/bees',       async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/bees'));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/bees/:id',    async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', `/api/v2/bees/${req.params.id}`));[39m
[31m+     router.delete('/bees/:id', async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', `/api/v2/bees/${req.params.id}`));[39m
[31m+     router.post('/bees/:id/restart', async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', `/api/v2/bees/${req.params.id}/restart`));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Vector memory ────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/memory/ingest', async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/memory/ingest'));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/memory/query',   async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/memory/query'));[39m
[31m+     router.delete('/memory',      async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/memory'));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Creative engine ──────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/creative/generate', async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/creative/generate'));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/creative/styles',    async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/creative/styles'));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Edge diffusion (image generation) ────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/image/generate', async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'heady-ai', '/api/v2/image/generate'));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── MCP tools ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/mcp/tools',               async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headymcp', '/api/v2/mcp/tools'));[39m
[31m+     router.post('/mcp/tools/:toolName/run', async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headymcp', `/api/v2/mcp/tools/${req.params.toolName}/run`));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Buddy / sovereign orchestrator ────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/buddy/task',          async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headybuddy', '/api/v2/buddy/task'));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/buddy/status',         async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headybuddy', '/api/v2/buddy/status'));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/buddy/metacognition',  async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headybuddy', '/api/v2/buddy/metacognition'));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Self-awareness ────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/awareness/status',     async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/awareness/status'));[39m
[31m+     router.get('/awareness/telemetry',  async (req, res) => this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/awareness/telemetry'));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Config (admin only) ───────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.use('/admin/config', this._adminAuthMiddleware(), (() => {[39m
[31m+       try { return require('./heady-config-server').getConfigServer().router(); } catch { return (_r, res) => res.json({ error: 'Config server not available.' }); }[39m
[31m+     })());[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Service mesh (admin only) ─────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/admin/mesh', this._adminAuthMiddleware(), async (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const status = this.mesh ? await this.mesh.status() : { error: 'Mesh not available.' };[39m
[31m+         res.json(status);[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Observability ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     if (this.obs) {[39m
[31m+       router.use('/obs', this.obs.router());[39m
[31m+     } else {[39m
[31m+       router.get('/obs/metrics', (_req, res) => res.status(503).json({ error: 'Observability not configured.' }));[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Event bus admin ───────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.get('/admin/events/topics', this._adminAuthMiddleware(), (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       const topics = this.bus ? this.bus.listTopics() : [];[39m
[31m+       res.json({ topics });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Ternary logic ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     router.post('/ternary/evaluate', async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       return this._proxyToService(req, res, 'headyapi', '/api/v2/ternary/evaluate');[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     return router;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Admin auth middleware ─────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _adminAuthMiddleware() {[39m
[31m+     return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       if (req.auth?.roles?.includes('admin')) return next();[39m
[31m+       const adminToken = req.headers['x-admin-token'] || '';[39m
[31m+       if (!adminToken) return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Admin token required.' });[39m
[31m+       const expectedHash = this.cfg[39m
[31m+         ? this.cfg.get('gateway.adminTokenHash', this._opts.adminTokenHash)[39m
[31m+         : this._opts.adminTokenHash;[39m
[31m+       if (!expectedHash) return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Admin token hash not configured.' });[39m
[31m+       const actualHash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(adminToken).digest('hex');[39m
[31m+       if (!crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(actualHash), Buffer.from(expectedHash))) {[39m
[31m+         return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Invalid admin token.' });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       req.auth = { ...(req.auth || {}), roles: ['admin', 'service'] };[39m
[31m+       next();[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Webhook router ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _webhookRouter() {[39m
[31m+     const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+     const router  = express.Router();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // GCP Pub/Sub push subscription[39m
[31m+     router.post('/pubsub', express.json(), async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       const { message, subscription } = req.body || {};[39m
[31m+       if (!message) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Pub/Sub message required.' });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const data = JSON.parse(Buffer.from(message.data, 'base64').toString('utf8'));[39m
[31m+         const attributes = message.attributes || {};[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+         this.obs?.logger.info('PubSub message received', {[39m
[31m+           subscription,[39m
[31m+           messageId: message.messageId,[39m
[31m+           topic:     attributes.topic,[39m
[31m+           traceId:   req.headyTrace?.traceId,[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+         // Publish to internal event bus[39m
[31m+         if (this.bus) {[39m
[31m+           const topic = attributes.eventType || 'heady:pubsub:message:received';[39m
[31m+           await this.bus.publish(topic, { ...data, _pubsubMessageId: message.messageId, _subscription: subscription });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+         res.sendStatus(200); // ACK — prevents Pub/Sub redelivery[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         this.obs?.logger.error('PubSub message parse error', { error: err.message, traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId });[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid Pub/Sub message payload.' });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     return router;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Service proxy helper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   async _proxyToService(req, res, serviceName, targetPath) {[39m
[31m+     // Resolve URL via service mesh if available, else use registry fallback[39m
[31m+     let baseUrl;[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       baseUrl = this.mesh ? await this.mesh.resolve(serviceName) : this._fallbackUrl(serviceName);[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       return res.status(503).json({[39m
[31m+         error:   `Service '${serviceName}' unavailable.`,[39m
[31m+         detail:  err.message,[39m
[31m+         traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId,[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     const url = `${baseUrl}${targetPath}${req.url.includes('?') ? req.url.substring(req.url.indexOf('?')) : ''}`;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     const outHeaders = {[39m
[31m+       'Content-Type':    'application/json',[39m
[31m+       'X-Forwarded-For': req.ip,[39m
[31m+       'X-Real-IP':       req.ip,[39m
[31m+       ...( this.obs ? this.obs.tracer.injectHeaders({}) : {} ),[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     if (req.auth?.userId)  outHeaders['X-Heady-User']    = req.auth.userId;[39m
[31m+     if (req.auth?.roles)   outHeaders['X-Heady-Roles']   = req.auth.roles.join(',');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       const parsed  = new URL(url);[39m
[31m+       const mod     = parsed.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http;[39m
[31m+       const reqOpts = {[39m
[31m+         hostname: parsed.hostname,[39m
[31m+         port:     parsed.port || (parsed.protocol === 'https:' ? 443 : 80),[39m
[31m+         path:     parsed.pathname + parsed.search,[39m
[31m+         method:   req.method,[39m
[31m+         headers:  outHeaders,[39m
[31m+         timeout:  PHI_TIMING.CYCLE,[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       const proxyReq = mod.request(reqOpts, (proxyRes) => {[39m
[31m+         res.status(proxyRes.statusCode);[39m
[31m+         for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(proxyRes.headers)) {[39m
[31m+           if (!['transfer-encoding', 'connection'].includes(k.toLowerCase())) {[39m
[31m+             res.setHeader(k, v);[39m
[31m+           }[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         proxyRes.pipe(res);[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       proxyReq.on('timeout', () => {[39m
[31m+         proxyReq.destroy();[39m
[31m+         if (!res.headersSent) {[39m
[31m+           res.status(504).json({ error: 'Gateway timeout.', service: serviceName, traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+       proxyReq.on('error', (err) => {[39m
[31m+         if (!res.headersSent) {[39m
[31m+           res.status(502).json({ error: 'Bad gateway.', detail: err.message, service: serviceName, traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId });[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       if (['POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH'].includes(req.method) && req.body) {[39m
[31m+         proxyReq.write(JSON.stringify(req.body));[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       proxyReq.end();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       res.status(500).json({ error: 'Proxy error.', detail: err.message, traceId: req.headyTrace?.traceId });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   _fallbackUrl(serviceName) {[39m
[31m+     const FALLBACK = {[39m
[31m+       headyapi:     process.env.HEADY_API_URL     || 'https://heady-manager-609590223909.us-central1.run.app',[39m
[31m+       headymcp:     process.env.HEADY_MCP_URL     || 'https://headymcp.com',[39m
[31m+       headybuddy:   process.env.HEADY_BUDDY_URL   || 'https://headybuddy.org',[39m
[31m+       'heady-ai': process.env.HEADY_AI_URL      || 'https://heady-ai.com',[39m
[31m+       headyio:      process.env.HEADY_IO_URL      || 'https://headyio.com',[39m
[31m+       headybot:     process.env.HEADY_BOT_URL     || 'https://headybot.com',[39m
[31m+       headysystems: process.env.HEADY_SYSTEMS_URL || 'https://headysystems.com',[39m
[31m+       headyme:      process.env.HEADY_ME_URL      || 'https://headyme.com',[39m
[31m+       headyconnection: process.env.HEADY_CONNECTION_URL || 'https://headyconnection.org',[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     const url = FALLBACK[serviceName];[39m
[31m+     if (!url) throw new Error(`No fallback URL for service '${serviceName}'.`);[39m
[31m+     return url;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Returns an Express router (for embedding in an existing app).[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   router() {[39m
[31m+     const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+     const router  = express.Router();[39m
[31m+     router.use(this._corsMiddleware());[39m
[31m+     router.use(this._securityHeaders());[39m
[31m+     router.use('/api', this._versionRouter());[39m
[31m+     router.use('/webhooks', this._webhookRouter());[39m
[31m+     return router;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m

[31m+   if (!_instance) _instance = new HeadyApiGatewayV2(opts);[39m
[31m+   return _instance;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
