/**
 * Heady™ Projection Service — Main Entry Point
 *
 * Initialises ProjectionManager, all 6 domain bees, ProjectionSwarm, SSE broadcaster,
 * HeadyConductor integration, and the Express HTTP server.
 *
 * Environment variables:
 *   PROJECTION_PORT    — HTTP port (default 3849)
 *   CONDUCTOR_URL      — HeadyConductor URL (default http://localhost:3848)
 *   LOG_LEVEL          — Logging level: debug|info|warn|error (default info)
 *   PUBSUB_TOPIC       — GCP Pub/Sub topic for cloud broadcast (optional)
 */

import express from 'express';
import { createServer } from 'node:http';
import { EventEmitter } from 'node:events';

// ── Constants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const PHI = 1.6180339887;
const PORT = Number(process.env.PROJECTION_PORT) || 3849;
const LOG_LEVEL = process.env.LOG_LEVEL || 'info';
const LEVELS = {
  debug: 0,
  info: 1,
  warn: 2,
  error: 3
};
const log = (level, ...args) => {
  if ((LEVELS[level] ?? 0) >= (LEVELS[LOG_LEVEL] ?? 1)) {
    const prefix = `[${new Date().toISOString()}] [projection-service] [${level.toUpperCase()}]`;
    (level === 'error' ? console.error : console.log)(prefix, ...args);
  }
};

// ── ProjectionManager ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class ProjectionManager extends EventEmitter {
  constructor() {
    super();
    /** @type {Map<string, object>} */
    this.projections = new Map();
    this.versions = new Map();
    this.startedAt = Date.now();
  }

  /**
   * Update a projection domain with new state.
   * Increments version, emits 'projection' event.
   * @param {string} domain
   * @param {object} state
   */
  update(domain, state) {
    const prev = this.projections.get(domain);
    const version = (this.versions.get(domain) || 0) + 1;
    this.versions.set(domain, version);
    const projection = {
      domain,
      version,
      state,
      prev: prev?.state ?? null,
      updatedAt: Date.now()
    };
    this.projections.set(domain, projection);
    this.emit('projection', projection);
    log('debug', `Updated projection [${domain}] v${version}`);
    return projection;
  }

  /**
   * Get current projection state.
   * @param {string} domain
   */
  get(domain) {
    return this.projections.get(domain) ?? null;
  }

  /**
   * Get all current projections.
   * @returns {object[]}
   */
  getAll() {
    return Array.from(this.projections.values());
  }

  /**
   * Return manager health info.
   */
  getHealth() {
    return {
      domains: this.projections.size,
      startedAt: this.startedAt,
      uptimeMs: Date.now() - this.startedAt
    };
  }
}

// ── ProjectionSwarm ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class ProjectionSwarm {
  /**
   * @param {ProjectionManager} manager
   * @param {object[]} bees
   * @param {{ maxConcurrent?: number, errorThreshold?: number }} opts
   */
  constructor(manager, bees, opts = {}) {
    this.manager = manager;
    this.bees = bees;
    this.maxConcurrent = opts.maxConcurrent || 6;
    this.errorThreshold = opts.errorThreshold || 0.3;
    this.running = false;
    this.timers = [];
    this.stats = {
      runs: 0,
      errors: 0,
      lastRunAt: null
    };
  }

  /** Start all bee polling loops. */
  start() {
    if (this.running) return;
    this.running = true;
    log('info', `ProjectionSwarm starting — ${this.bees.length} bees, maxConcurrent=${this.maxConcurrent}`);
    for (const bee of this.bees) {
      const interval = bee.intervalMs || Math.round(PHI * 5000);
      const timer = setInterval(() => this._runBee(bee), interval);
      this.timers.push(timer);
      // Stagger initial runs with PHI-scaled offsets
      const stagger = Math.round(PHI * 200 * this.bees.indexOf(bee));
      setTimeout(() => this._runBee(bee), stagger);
    }
  }

  /** Stop all bee loops. */
  stop() {
    this.running = false;
    this.timers.forEach(t => clearInterval(t));
    this.timers = [];
    log('info', 'ProjectionSwarm stopped.');
  }

  /** Execute a single bee's workers and update the manager. */
  async _runBee(bee) {
    if (!this.running) return;
    this.stats.runs++;
    this.stats.lastRunAt = Date.now();
    try {
      const workers = bee.getWork();
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(workers.slice(0, this.maxConcurrent).map(fn => fn()));
      const merged = {};
      for (const res of results) {
        if (res.status === 'fulfilled') {
          Object.assign(merged, res.value);
        } else {
          this.stats.errors++;
          log('warn', `Bee [${bee.domain}] worker error:`, res.reason?.message);
        }
      }
      this.manager.update(bee.domain, merged);
    } catch (e) {
      this.stats.errors++;
      log('error', `Bee [${bee.domain}] run failed:`, e.message);
    }
  }

  /** Swarm health ratio. */
  getHealth() {
    const ratio = this.stats.runs > 0 ? 1 - this.stats.errors / this.stats.runs : 1;
    return {
      running: this.running,
      beeCount: this.bees.length,
      totalRuns: this.stats.runs,
      totalErrors: this.stats.errors,
      healthRatio: Math.max(0, ratio),
      lastRunAt: this.stats.lastRunAt
    };
  }
}

function makeStubbedBee(domain, intervalMs, workerFns) {
  return {
    domain,
    intervalMs,
    getWork: () => workerFns
  };
}

// ── SSE broadcaster ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class SSEBroadcaster {
  constructor() {
    /** @type {Set<import('express').Response>} */
    this.clients = new Set();
    this.heartbeatMs = Math.round(PHI * 10000);
    this._heartbeatTimer = null;
  }

  /**
   * Register a new SSE client.
   * @param {import('express').Request}  req
   * @param {import('express').Response} res
   */
  addClient(req, res) {
    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
    res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
    res.flushHeaders?.();

    // Send current snapshot
    res.write(`event: connected\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({
      ts: Date.now(),
      phi: PHI
    })}\\n\\n`);
    this.clients.add(res);
    log('info', `SSE client connected (total: ${this.clients.size})`);
    req.on('close', () => {
      this.clients.delete(res);
      log('info', `SSE client disconnected (total: ${this.clients.size})`);
    });
  }

  /**
   * Broadcast a projection event to all clients.
   * @param {object} projection
   */
  broadcast(projection) {
    const payload = JSON.stringify(projection);
    const frame = `event: ${projection.domain}\\ndata: ${payload}\\n\\n`;
    for (const client of this.clients) {
      try {
        client.write(frame);
      } catch (e) {
        this.clients.delete(client);
      }
    }
  }

  /** Start heartbeat ping loop. */
  startHeartbeat() {
    this._heartbeatTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const frame = `event: heartbeat\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({
        ts: Date.now()
      })}\\n\\n`;
      for (const client of this.clients) {
        try {
          client.write(frame);
        } catch {
          this.clients.delete(client);
        }
      }
    }, this.heartbeatMs);
  }
  stopHeartbeat() {
    clearInterval(this._heartbeatTimer);
  }
  get clientCount() {
    return this.clients.size;
  }
}

// ── HeadyConductor integration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
class HeadyConductorClient {
  constructor(url) {
    this.url = url || process.env.CONDUCTOR_URL || \"http://0.0.0.0:3848\";
    this.connected = false;
  }
  async register(serviceInfo) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${this.url}/register`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(serviceInfo),
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(2000)
      });
      this.connected = res.ok;
      if (res.ok) log('info', `Registered with Heady™Conductor at ${this.url}`);
    } catch {
      log('warn', `HeadyConductor not available at ${this.url} — continuing without it`);
    }
  }
  async heartbeat(state) {
    if (!this.connected) return;
    try {
      await fetch(`${this.url}/heartbeat`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(state),
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(1000)
      });
    } catch {/* conductor offline */}
  }
}

// ── Express app ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const app = express();
const manager = new ProjectionManager();
const swarm = new ProjectionSwarm(manager, BEES, {
  maxConcurrent: 6
});
const sse = new SSEBroadcaster();
const conductor = new HeadyConductorClient();
app.use(express.json());

// Wire SSE broadcast to projection updates
manager.on('projection', p => sse.broadcast(p));

// ── Routes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Health check
app.get('/health', (_req, res) => {
  res.json({
    service: 'projection-service',
    status: 'ok',
    phi: PHI,
    manager: manager.getHealth(),
    swarm: swarm.getHealth(),
    sseClients: sse.clientCount,
    ts: Date.now()
  });
});

// Get all projections (snapshot)
app.get('/api/projections', (_req, res) => {
  res.json({
    projections: manager.getAll(),
    ts: Date.now()
  });
});

// Get single projection
app.get('/api/projections/:domain', (req, res) => {
  const p = manager.get(req.params.domain);
  if (!p) return res.status(404).json({
    error: 'Projection not found',
    domain: req.params.domain
  });
  res.json(p);
});

// SSE stream endpoint
app.get('/api/projections/sse', (req, res) => {
  sse.addClient(req, res);
  // Send current snapshot to new client
  manager.getAll().forEach(p => {
    const frame = `event: ${p.domain}\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(p)}\\n\\n`;
    res.write(frame);
  });
});

// Swarm health
app.get('/api/swarm', (_req, res) => {
  res.json(swarm.getHealth());
});

// 404
app.use((_req, res) => {
  res.status(404).json({
    error: 'Not Found'
  });
});

// ── Start server ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const server = createServer(app);
server.listen(PORT, async () => {
  log('info', `Projection service listening on port ${PORT} (φ = ${PHI})`);
  swarm.start();
  sse.startHeartbeat();
  await conductor.register({
    service: 'projection-service',
    port: PORT,
    phi: PHI,
    domains: BEES.map(b => b.domain),
    ts: Date.now()
  });

  // Conductor heartbeat every PHI * 30s
  setInterval(() => conductor.heartbeat(swarm.getHealth()), Math.round(PHI * 30_000));
});

// ── Graceful shutdown ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function shutdown(signal) {
  log('info', `${signal} received — shutting down…`);
  swarm.stop();
  sse.stopHeartbeat();
  server.close(() => {
    log('info', 'HTTP server closed.');
    process.exit(0);
  });
  // Force exit after PHI * 5s
  setTimeout(() => process.exit(1), Math.round(PHI * 5000)).unref();
}
process.on('SIGTERM', () => shutdown('SIGTERM'));
process.on('SIGINT', () => shutdown('SIGINT'));
process.on('uncaughtException', e => {
  log('error', 'Uncaught exception:', e);
});
process.on('unhandledRejection', r => {
  log('error', 'Unhandled rejection:', r);
});
export { app, manager, swarm, sse };"

[31m+       return this._hostnameMap.get(norm);[39m

[31m+         if (industryVerticalId) return industryVerticalId;[39m

[31m+     // 3. Parent domain fallback (strip deepest subdomain, recurse once)[39m
[31m+     if (parts.length > 2) {[39m
[31m+       const parent = parts.slice(1).join('.');[39m
[31m+       if (this._hostnameMap.has(parent)) {[39m
[31m+         return this._hostnameMap.get(parent);[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // 4. Default[39m
[31m+     return this.defaultVertical;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Map known industry subdomains to their vertical_id.[39m
[31m+    * These subdomains represent Heady™'s industry verticals.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} subdomain — e.g. "health", "legal"[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} _parentVerticalId — parent domain's vertical (unused currently)[39m
[31m+    * @returns {string|null}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _resolveIndustrySubdomain(subdomain, _parentVerticalId) {[39m
[31m+     const industryMap = {[39m
[31m+       health: 'health',[39m
[31m+       wellness: 'wellness',[39m
[31m+       legal: 'legal',[39m
[31m+       law: 'legal',[39m
[31m+       finance: 'finance',[39m
[31m+       financial: 'finance',[39m
[31m+       investing: 'investments',[39m
[31m+       invest: 'investments',[39m
[31m+       realestate: 'realestate',[39m
[31m+       property: 'realestate',[39m
[31m+       education: 'education',[39m
[31m+       learn: 'education',[39m
[31m+       edu: 'education',[39m
[31m+       hr: 'hr',[39m
[31m+       people: 'hr',[39m
[31m+       logistics: 'logistics',[39m
[31m+       supply: 'logistics',[39m
[31m+       retail: 'retail',[39m
[31m+       shop: 'retail'[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     return industryMap[subdomain.toLowerCase()] || null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Load the full configuration object for a vertical_id.[39m
[31m+    * Merges: base registry entry + optional per-vertical config file.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} verticalId[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Object} complete vertical config[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   loadVerticalConfig(verticalId) {[39m
[31m+     // Check cache[39m
[31m+     const cached = this._configCache.get(verticalId);[39m
[31m+     if (cached && Date.now() - cached.loadedAt < this.cacheTtl * 1000) {[39m
[31m+       return cached.config;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     this._loadRegistry();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Find registry entry[39m
[31m+     const entry = (this._registry.verticals || []).find(v => v.vertical_id === verticalId);[39m
[31m+     if (!entry) {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[HeadySystems] Unknown vertical_id "${verticalId}", falling back to "${this.defaultVertical}"`);[39m
[31m+       return this.loadVerticalConfig(this.defaultVertical);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Start with registry entry as base config[39m
[31m+     let config = {[39m
[31m+       ...entry[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     if (entry.config_path) {[39m
[31m+       const configFilePath = path.isAbsolute(entry.config_path) ? entry.config_path : path.resolve(this.configDir, entry.config_path);[39m
[31m+       if (fs.existsSync(configFilePath)) {[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           const fileContent = fs.readFileSync(configFilePath, 'utf8');[39m
[31m+           const fileConfig = JSON.parse(fileContent);[39m
[31m+           // Deep merge: file config overrides registry entry[39m
[31m+           config = deepMerge(config, fileConfig);[39m
[31m+         } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+           logger.error(`[HeadySystems] Failed to load config at ${configFilePath}: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Normalize config to ensure all required fields exist[39m
[31m+     config = normalizeConfig(config, verticalId);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Cache[39m
[31m+     this._configCache.set(verticalId, {[39m
[31m+       config,[39m
[31m+       loadedAt: Date.now()[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     this.emit('config:loaded', {[39m
[31m+       verticalId,[39m
[31m+       config[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     return config;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Invalidate cache for a specific vertical (or all if no id given).[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} [verticalId][39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   invalidateCache(verticalId) {[39m
[31m+     if (verticalId) {[39m
[31m+       this._configCache.delete(verticalId);[39m
[31m+     } else {[39m
[31m+       this._configCache.clear();[39m
[31m+       this._loaded = false;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Return a middleware function for use with Express.[39m
[31m+    * Attaches req.vertical and req.verticalId.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Function} Express middleware (req, res, next)[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   middleware() {[39m
[31m+     return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const hostname = req.hostname || req.headers.host || '';[39m
[31m+         const verticalId = this.resolveVerticalId(hostname);[39m
[31m+         const config = this.loadVerticalConfig(verticalId);[39m
[31m+         req.verticalId = verticalId;[39m
[31m+         req.vertical = config;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+         // Set some useful response headers for debugging[39m
[31m+         if (process.env.HEADY_ENV !== 'production') {[39m
[31m+           res.setHeader('X-Heady-Vertical', verticalId);[39m
[31m+           res.setHeader('X-Heady-Domain', hostname);[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         res.locals.vertical = config;[39m
[31m+         res.locals.verticalId = verticalId;[39m
[31m+         next();[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('[HeadySystems] verticalRouter error:', err);[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           req.verticalId = this.defaultVertical;[39m
[31m+           req.vertical = this.loadVerticalConfig(this.defaultVertical);[39m
[31m+           res.locals.vertical = req.vertical;[39m
[31m+           res.locals.verticalId = req.verticalId;[39m
[31m+         } catch (fallbackErr) {[39m
[31m+           logger.error('[HeadySystems] Fatal: cannot load default vertical config:', fallbackErr);[39m
[31m+           req.vertical = buildEmptyConfig(this.defaultVertical);[39m
[31m+           res.locals.vertical = req.vertical;[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         next();[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Factory function ───────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Create and return a configured Express middleware.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} [options][39m
[31m+  * @param {string} [options.registryPath][39m
[31m+  * @param {string} [options.configDir][39m
[31m+  * @param {number} [options.cacheTtl][39m
[31m+  * @param {string} [options.defaultVertical][39m
[31m+  * @returns {Function} Express middleware[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function verticalRouter(options) {[39m
[31m+   const resolver = new VerticalResolver(options);[39m
[31m+   return resolver.middleware();[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Config Normalization ───────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Ensure a config object has all required fields, filling missing[39m
[31m+  * fields with sensible defaults derived from the vertical_id.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} raw[39m
[31m+  * @param {string} verticalId[39m
[31m+  * @returns {Object}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function normalizeConfig(raw, verticalId) {[39m
[31m+   return {[39m
[31m+     // Identity[39m
[31m+     id: raw.vertical_id || verticalId,[39m
[31m+     domain: raw.domain || `${verticalId}.com`,[39m
[31m+     status: raw.status || 'planned',[39m
[31m+     deployed_at: raw.deployed_at || null,[39m
[31m+     // Brand[39m
[31m+     brand: {[39m
[31m+       name: raw.brand?.name || titleCase(verticalId),[39m
[31m+       tagline: raw.brand?.tagline || '',[39m
[31m+       logo: raw.brand?.logo || null,[39m
[31m+       favicon: raw.brand?.favicon || '/favicon.ico',[39m
[31m+       colors: {[39m
[31m+         primary: raw.brand?.colors?.primary || '#0a0e17',[39m
[31m+         secondary: raw.brand?.colors?.secondary || '#0d1321',[39m
[31m+         accent: raw.brand?.colors?.accent || '#2dd4bf'[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Content[39m
[31m+     content: {[39m
[31m+       hero: {[39m
[31m+         title: raw.content?.hero?.title || '',[39m
[31m+         subtitle: raw.content?.hero?.subtitle || '',[39m
[31m+         cta_text: raw.content?.hero?.cta_text || 'Get Started',[39m
[31m+         cta_url: raw.content?.hero?.cta_url || '/signup',[39m
[31m+         background_type: raw.content?.hero?.background_type || 'sacred-geometry'[39m
[31m+       },[39m
[31m+       features: raw.content?.features || [],[39m
[31m+       pricing: {[39m
[31m+         enabled: raw.content?.pricing?.enabled !== false,[39m
[31m+         tiers: raw.content?.pricing?.tiers || [][39m
[31m+       },[39m
[31m+       testimonials: raw.content?.testimonials || [],[39m
[31m+       metrics: raw.content?.metrics || [][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // SEO meta[39m
[31m+     meta: {[39m
[31m+       title: raw.meta?.title || `${titleCase(verticalId)} — HeadySystems`,[39m
[31m+       description: raw.meta?.description || '',[39m
[31m+       og_image: raw.meta?.og_image || '/og-default.png',[39m
[31m+       twitter_handle: raw.meta?.twitter_handle || '@headysystems',[39m
[31m+       analytics_id: raw.meta?.analytics_id || null,[39m
[31m+       canonical_url: raw.meta?.canonical_url || `https://${raw.domain || verticalId + '.com'}`[39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Navigation[39m
[31m+     navigation: {[39m
[31m+       items: raw.navigation?.items || [][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Footer[39m
[31m+     footer: {[39m
[31m+       columns: raw.footer?.columns || [],[39m
[31m+       social_links: raw.footer?.social_links || [],[39m
[31m+       legal_links: raw.footer?.legal_links || [{[39m
[31m+         label: 'Privacy Policy',[39m
[31m+         url: '/privacy'[39m
[31m+       }, {[39m
[31m+         label: 'Terms of Service',[39m
[31m+         url: '/terms'[39m
[31m+       }][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Compliance[39m
[31m+     compliance: {[39m
[31m+       badges: raw.compliance?.badges || [][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Custom CSS override (vertical-specific style tweaks)[39m
[31m+     custom_css: raw.custom_css || '',[39m
[31m+     // Design system hint[39m
[31m+     design: {[39m
[31m+       theme: raw.design?.theme || 'dark',[39m
[31m+       accent_variant: raw.design?.accent_variant || 'teal',[39m
[31m+       data_vertical: raw.design?.data_vertical || verticalId[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Build a minimal empty config for absolute fallback situations.[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function buildEmptyConfig(verticalId) {[39m
[31m+   return normalizeConfig({[39m
[31m+     vertical_id: verticalId[39m
[31m+   }, verticalId);[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Deep Merge Utility ─────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Deep merge two objects. Arrays in `override` fully replace arrays in `base`.[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} base[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} override[39m
[31m+  * @returns {Object}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function deepMerge(base, override) {[39m
[31m+   if (!override || typeof override !== 'object' || Array.isArray(override)) {[39m
[31m+     return override !== undefined ? override : base;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   const result = {[39m
[31m+     ...base[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+   Object.keys(override).forEach(key => {[39m
[31m+     const bVal = base[key];[39m
[31m+     const oVal = override[key];[39m
[31m+     if (oVal !== null && typeof oVal === 'object' && !Array.isArray(oVal) && bVal !== null && typeof bVal === 'object' && !Array.isArray(bVal)) {[39m
[31m+       result[key] = deepMerge(bVal, oVal);[39m
[31m+     } else {[39m
[31m+       result[key] = oVal;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   return result;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── String Utilities ───────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ function titleCase(str) {[39m
[31m+   return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + str.slice(1);[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Health Check Helper ────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Express route handler for /health/vertical[39m
[31m+  * Returns resolved vertical info as JSON.[39m
[31m+  * Useful for debugging routing in staging.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Usage:[39m
[31m+  *   app.get('/health/vertical', verticalHealthCheck(resolver));[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function verticalHealthCheck(resolver) {[39m
[31m+   return (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+     const hostname = req.hostname || req.headers.host || '';[39m
[31m+     const verticalId = resolver.resolveVerticalId(hostname);[39m
[31m+     const config = resolver.loadVerticalConfig(verticalId);[39m
[31m+     res.json({[39m
[31m+       hostname,[39m
[31m+       verticalId,[39m
[31m+       domain: config.domain,[39m
[31m+       status: config.status,[39m
[31m+       brand: config.brand?.name,[39m
[31m+       env: process.env.HEADY_ENV || 'development',[39m
[31m+       force: process.env.FORCE_VERTICAL || null[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Watch mode (development) ───────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Watch the registry file for changes and auto-invalidate the cache.[39m
[31m+  * Only call this in development environments.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {VerticalResolver} resolver[39m
[31m+  * @returns {{ stop: Function }}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function watchRegistry(resolver) {[39m
[31m+   let watcher = null;[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     watcher = fs.watch(resolver.registryPath, {[39m
[31m+       persistent: false[39m
[31m+     }, eventType => {[39m
[31m+       if (eventType === 'change') {[39m
[31m+         logger.info('[HeadySystems] vertical-registry.json changed — reloading');[39m
[31m+         resolver.invalidateCache();[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+     logger.warn(`[HeadySystems] Could not watch registry file: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   return {[39m
[31m+     stop() {[39m
[31m+       if (watcher) {[39m
[31m+         watcher.close();[39m
[31m+         watcher = null;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Exports ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ module.exports = {[39m
[31m+   VerticalResolver,[39m
[31m+   verticalRouter,[39m
[31m+   verticalHealthCheck,[39m
[31m+   watchRegistry,[39m
[31m+   deepMerge,[39m
[31m+   normalizeConfig[39m
[31m+ };[39m

 FAIL  tests/production-hardening-batch5.test.js > site-router structured logging > uses structured event names for vertical router operations
AssertionError: expected '\'use strict\';\nconst { createLogger…' to contain 'vertical_registry_not_found'

[32m- Expected[39m

[31m+ 'use strict';[39m
[31m+ const { createLogger } = require('../../utils/logger');[39m
[31m+ const logger = createLogger('auto-fixed');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ const path = require('path');[39m
[31m+ const fs = require('fs');[39m
[31m+ const EventEmitter = require('events');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_VERTICAL = 'headyme';[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_REGISTRY_PATH = path.resolve(__dirname, 'vertical-registry.json');[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_CONFIG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'configs');[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_CACHE_TTL = 300; // seconds[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── VerticalResolver ───────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ class VerticalResolver extends EventEmitter {[39m
[31m+   constructor(options = {}) {[39m
[31m+     super();[39m
[31m+     this.registryPath = options.registryPath || process.env.VERTICAL_REGISTRY_PATH || DEFAULT_REGISTRY_PATH;[39m
[31m+     this.configDir = options.configDir || process.env.VERTICAL_CONFIG_DIR || DEFAULT_CONFIG_DIR;[39m
[31m+     this.cacheTtl = options.cacheTtl || parseInt(process.env.VERTICAL_CACHE_TTL || String(DEFAULT_CACHE_TTL), 10);[39m
[31m+     this.defaultVertical = options.defaultVertical || DEFAULT_VERTICAL;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Map<string, { config: Object, loadedAt: number }>} vertical config cache */[39m
[31m+     this._configCache = new Map();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Map<string, string>} hostname → vertical_id lookup table */[39m
[31m+     this._hostnameMap = new Map();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Object|null} parsed registry */[39m
[31m+     this._registry = null;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {number} registry last loaded timestamp */[39m
[31m+     this._registryLoadedAt = 0;[39m
[31m+     this._loaded = false;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Load (or reload) the vertical registry from disk.[39m
[31m+    * Rebuilds the hostname lookup map.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Object} registry[39m
[31m+    * @throws {Error} if registry cannot be parsed[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _loadRegistry() {[39m
[31m+     const now = Date.now();[39m
[31m+     if (this._loaded && now - this._registryLoadedAt < this.cacheTtl * 1000) {[39m
[31m+       return this._registry;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     let raw;[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       raw = fs.readFileSync(this.registryPath, 'utf8');[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       if (!this._registry) {[39m
[31m+         // First load failure — create empty registry[39m
[31m+         logger.error(`[HeadySystems] vertical-registry.json not found at ${this.registryPath}. Using empty registry.`);[39m
[31m+         this._registry = {[39m
[31m+           verticals: [][39m
[31m+         };[39m
[31m+         this._loaded = true;[39m
[31m+         return this._registry;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       // Subsequent failure — keep stale registry[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[HeadySystems] Could not reload vertical-registry.json: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+       return this._registry;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       this._registry = JSON.parse(raw);[39m
[31m+     } catch (parseErr) {[39m
[31m+       throw new Error(`[HeadySystems] vertical-registry.json parse error: ${parseErr.message}`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Rebuild hostname → vertical_id map[39m
[31m+     this._hostnameMap.clear();[39m
[31m+     (this._registry.verticals || []).forEach(entry => {[39m
[31m+       // Primary domain[39m
[31m+       if (entry.domain) {[39m
[31m+         this._hostnameMap.set(this._normHost(entry.domain), entry.vertical_id);[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       // Alias domains[39m
[31m+       if (Array.isArray(entry.aliases)) {[39m
[31m+         entry.aliases.forEach(alias => {[39m
[31m+           this._hostnameMap.set(this._normHost(alias), entry.vertical_id);[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     this._registryLoadedAt = now;[39m
[31m+     this._loaded = true;[39m
[31m+     this.emit('registry:loaded', this._registry);[39m
[31m+     return this._registry;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Normalize a hostname for comparison:[39m
[31m+    *   - lowercase[39m
[31m+    *   - strip trailing dot[39m
[31m+    *   - strip www. prefix (unless the domain is www.example.com and that's its own entry)[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} host[39m
[31m+    * @returns {string}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _normHost(host) {[39m
[31m+     return host.toLowerCase().replace(/\.$/, '').replace(/^www\./, '');[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Resolve req.hostname to a vertical_id.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * Resolution order:[39m
[31m+    *   1. FORCE_VERTICAL env var (dev override)[39m
[31m+    *   2. Exact hostname match in registry[39m
[31m+    *   3. Subdomain industry match (e.g. health.headyme.com → "health")[39m
[31m+    *   4. Parent domain match (e.g. api.headyos.com → "headyos")[39m
[31m+    *   5. Default vertical[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} hostname — from req.hostname (Express already strips port)[39m
[31m+    * @returns {string} vertical_id[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   resolveVerticalId(hostname) {[39m
[31m+     // Dev override[39m
[31m+     if (process.env.FORCE_VERTICAL) {[39m
[31m+       return process.env.FORCE_VERTICAL;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     this._loadRegistry();[39m
[31m+     const norm = this._normHost(hostname || '');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // 1. Exact match[39m
[31m+     if (this._hostnameMap.has(norm)) {[39m
[31m+       return this._hostnameMap.get(norm);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // 2. Industry subdomain matching: e.g. "health.headyme.com"[39m
[31m+     const parts = norm.split('.');[39m
[31m+     if (parts.length >= 3) {[39m
[31m+       const subdomain = parts[0];[39m
[31m+       const baseDomain = parts.slice(1).join('.');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+       // Check if base domain is a known heady domain[39m
[31m+       const baseVerticalId = this._hostnameMap.get(baseDomain);[39m
[31m+       if (baseVerticalId) {[39m
[31m+         // Check if subdomain is a registered industry vertical[39m
[31m+         const industryVerticalId = this._resolveIndustrySubdomain(subdomain, baseVerticalId);[39m
[31m+         if (industryVerticalId) return industryVerticalId;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // 3. Parent domain fallback (strip deepest subdomain, recurse once)[39m
[31m+     if (parts.length > 2) {[39m
[31m+       const parent = parts.slice(1).join('.');[39m
[31m+       if (this._hostnameMap.has(parent)) {[39m
[31m+         return this._hostnameMap.get(parent);[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // 4. Default[39m
[31m+     return this.defaultVertical;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Map known industry subdomains to their vertical_id.[39m
[31m+    * These subdomains represent Heady™'s industry verticals.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} subdomain — e.g. "health", "legal"[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} _parentVerticalId — parent domain's vertical (unused currently)[39m
[31m+    * @returns {string|null}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _resolveIndustrySubdomain(subdomain, _parentVerticalId) {[39m
[31m+     const industryMap = {[39m
[31m+       health: 'health',[39m
[31m+       wellness: 'wellness',[39m
[31m+       legal: 'legal',[39m
[31m+       law: 'legal',[39m
[31m+       finance: 'finance',[39m
[31m+       financial: 'finance',[39m
[31m+       investing: 'investments',[39m
[31m+       invest: 'investments',[39m
[31m+       realestate: 'realestate',[39m
[31m+       property: 'realestate',[39m
[31m+       education: 'education',[39m
[31m+       learn: 'education',[39m
[31m+       edu: 'education',[39m
[31m+       hr: 'hr',[39m
[31m+       people: 'hr',[39m
[31m+       logistics: 'logistics',[39m
[31m+       supply: 'logistics',[39m
[31m+       retail: 'retail',[39m
[31m+       shop: 'retail'[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     return industryMap[subdomain.toLowerCase()] || null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Load the full configuration object for a vertical_id.[39m
[31m+    * Merges: base registry entry + optional per-vertical config file.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} verticalId[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Object} complete vertical config[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   loadVerticalConfig(verticalId) {[39m
[31m+     // Check cache[39m
[31m+     const cached = this._configCache.get(verticalId);[39m
[31m+     if (cached && Date.now() - cached.loadedAt < this.cacheTtl * 1000) {[39m
[31m+       return cached.config;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     this._loadRegistry();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Find registry entry[39m
[31m+     const entry = (this._registry.verticals || []).find(v => v.vertical_id === verticalId);[39m
[31m+     if (!entry) {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[HeadySystems] Unknown vertical_id "${verticalId}", falling back to "${this.defaultVertical}"`);[39m
[31m+       return this.loadVerticalConfig(this.defaultVertical);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Start with registry entry as base config[39m
[31m+     let config = {[39m
[31m+       ...entry[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     if (entry.config_path) {[39m
[31m+       const configFilePath = path.isAbsolute(entry.config_path) ? entry.config_path : path.resolve(this.configDir, entry.config_path);[39m
[31m+       if (fs.existsSync(configFilePath)) {[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           const fileContent = fs.readFileSync(configFilePath, 'utf8');[39m
[31m+           const fileConfig = JSON.parse(fileContent);[39m
[31m+           // Deep merge: file config overrides registry entry[39m
[31m+           config = deepMerge(config, fileConfig);[39m
[31m+         } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+           logger.error(`[HeadySystems] Failed to load config at ${configFilePath}: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Normalize config to ensure all required fields exist[39m
[31m+     config = normalizeConfig(config, verticalId);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Cache[39m
[31m+     this._configCache.set(verticalId, {[39m
[31m+       config,[39m
[31m+       loadedAt: Date.now()[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     this.emit('config:loaded', {[39m
[31m+       verticalId,[39m
[31m+       config[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     return config;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Invalidate cache for a specific vertical (or all if no id given).[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} [verticalId][39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   invalidateCache(verticalId) {[39m
[31m+     if (verticalId) {[39m
[31m+       this._configCache.delete(verticalId);[39m
[31m+     } else {[39m
[31m+       this._configCache.clear();[39m
[31m+       this._loaded = false;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Return a middleware function for use with Express.[39m
[31m+    * Attaches req.vertical and req.verticalId.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Function} Express middleware (req, res, next)[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   middleware() {[39m
[31m+     return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const hostname = req.hostname || req.headers.host || '';[39m
[31m+         const verticalId = this.resolveVerticalId(hostname);[39m
[31m+         const config = this.loadVerticalConfig(verticalId);[39m
[31m+         req.verticalId = verticalId;[39m
[31m+         req.vertical = config;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+         // Set some useful response headers for debugging[39m
[31m+         if (process.env.HEADY_ENV !== 'production') {[39m
[31m+           res.setHeader('X-Heady-Vertical', verticalId);[39m
[31m+           res.setHeader('X-Heady-Domain', hostname);[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         res.locals.vertical = config;[39m
[31m+         res.locals.verticalId = verticalId;[39m
[31m+         next();[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         logger.error('[HeadySystems] verticalRouter error:', err);[39m
[31m+         try {[39m
[31m+           req.verticalId = this.defaultVertical;[39m
[31m+           req.vertical = this.loadVerticalConfig(this.defaultVertical);[39m
[31m+           res.locals.vertical = req.vertical;[39m
[31m+           res.locals.verticalId = req.verticalId;[39m
[31m+         } catch (fallbackErr) {[39m
[31m+           logger.error('[HeadySystems] Fatal: cannot load default vertical config:', fallbackErr);[39m
[31m+           req.vertical = buildEmptyConfig(this.defaultVertical);[39m
[31m+           res.locals.vertical = req.vertical;[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+         next();[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Factory function ───────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Create and return a configured Express middleware.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} [options][39m
[31m+  * @param {string} [options.registryPath][39m
[31m+  * @param {string} [options.configDir][39m
[31m+  * @param {number} [options.cacheTtl][39m
[31m+  * @param {string} [options.defaultVertical][39m
[31m+  * @returns {Function} Express middleware[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function verticalRouter(options) {[39m
[31m+   const resolver = new VerticalResolver(options);[39m
[31m+   return resolver.middleware();[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Config Normalization ───────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Ensure a config object has all required fields, filling missing[39m
[31m+  * fields with sensible defaults derived from the vertical_id.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} raw[39m
[31m+  * @param {string} verticalId[39m
[31m+  * @returns {Object}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function normalizeConfig(raw, verticalId) {[39m
[31m+   return {[39m
[31m+     // Identity[39m
[31m+     id: raw.vertical_id || verticalId,[39m
[31m+     domain: raw.domain || `${verticalId}.com`,[39m
[31m+     status: raw.status || 'planned',[39m
[31m+     deployed_at: raw.deployed_at || null,[39m
[31m+     // Brand[39m
[31m+     brand: {[39m
[31m+       name: raw.brand?.name || titleCase(verticalId),[39m
[31m+       tagline: raw.brand?.tagline || '',[39m
[31m+       logo: raw.brand?.logo || null,[39m
[31m+       favicon: raw.brand?.favicon || '/favicon.ico',[39m
[31m+       colors: {[39m
[31m+         primary: raw.brand?.colors?.primary || '#0a0e17',[39m
[31m+         secondary: raw.brand?.colors?.secondary || '#0d1321',[39m
[31m+         accent: raw.brand?.colors?.accent || '#2dd4bf'[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Content[39m
[31m+     content: {[39m
[31m+       hero: {[39m
[31m+         title: raw.content?.hero?.title || '',[39m
[31m+         subtitle: raw.content?.hero?.subtitle || '',[39m
[31m+         cta_text: raw.content?.hero?.cta_text || 'Get Started',[39m
[31m+         cta_url: raw.content?.hero?.cta_url || '/signup',[39m
[31m+         background_type: raw.content?.hero?.background_type || 'sacred-geometry'[39m
[31m+       },[39m
[31m+       features: raw.content?.features || [],[39m
[31m+       pricing: {[39m
[31m+         enabled: raw.content?.pricing?.enabled !== false,[39m
[31m+         tiers: raw.content?.pricing?.tiers || [][39m
[31m+       },[39m
[31m+       testimonials: raw.content?.testimonials || [],[39m
[31m+       metrics: raw.content?.metrics || [][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // SEO meta[39m
[31m+     meta: {[39m
[31m+       title: raw.meta?.title || `${titleCase(verticalId)} — HeadySystems`,[39m
[31m+       description: raw.meta?.description || '',[39m
[31m+       og_image: raw.meta?.og_image || '/og-default.png',[39m
[31m+       twitter_handle: raw.meta?.twitter_handle || '@headysystems',[39m
[31m+       analytics_id: raw.meta?.analytics_id || null,[39m
[31m+       canonical_url: raw.meta?.canonical_url || `https://${raw.domain || verticalId + '.com'}`[39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Navigation[39m
[31m+     navigation: {[39m
[31m+       items: raw.navigation?.items || [][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Footer[39m
[31m+     footer: {[39m
[31m+       columns: raw.footer?.columns || [],[39m
[31m+       social_links: raw.footer?.social_links || [],[39m
[31m+       legal_links: raw.footer?.legal_links || [{[39m
[31m+         label: 'Privacy Policy',[39m
[31m+         url: '/privacy'[39m
[31m+       }, {[39m
[31m+         label: 'Terms of Service',[39m
[31m+         url: '/terms'[39m
[31m+       }][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Compliance[39m
[31m+     compliance: {[39m
[31m+       badges: raw.compliance?.badges || [][39m
[31m+     },[39m
[31m+     // Custom CSS override (vertical-specific style tweaks)[39m
[31m+     custom_css: raw.custom_css || '',[39m
[31m+     // Design system hint[39m
[31m+     design: {[39m
[31m+       theme: raw.design?.theme || 'dark',[39m
[31m+       accent_variant: raw.design?.accent_variant || 'teal',[39m
[31m+       data_vertical: raw.design?.data_vertical || verticalId[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Build a minimal empty config for absolute fallback situations.[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function buildEmptyConfig(verticalId) {[39m
[31m+   return normalizeConfig({[39m
[31m+     vertical_id: verticalId[39m
[31m+   }, verticalId);[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Deep Merge Utility ─────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Deep merge two objects. Arrays in `override` fully replace arrays in `base`.[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} base[39m
[31m+  * @param {Object} override[39m
[31m+  * @returns {Object}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function deepMerge(base, override) {[39m
[31m+   if (!override || typeof override !== 'object' || Array.isArray(override)) {[39m
[31m+     return override !== undefined ? override : base;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   const result = {[39m
[31m+     ...base[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+   Object.keys(override).forEach(key => {[39m
[31m+     const bVal = base[key];[39m
[31m+     const oVal = override[key];[39m
[31m+     if (oVal !== null && typeof oVal === 'object' && !Array.isArray(oVal) && bVal !== null && typeof bVal === 'object' && !Array.isArray(bVal)) {[39m
[31m+       result[key] = deepMerge(bVal, oVal);[39m
[31m+     } else {[39m
[31m+       result[key] = oVal;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   return result;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── String Utilities ───────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ function titleCase(str) {[39m
[31m+   return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + str.slice(1);[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Health Check Helper ────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Express route handler for /health/vertical[39m
[31m+  * Returns resolved vertical info as JSON.[39m
[31m+  * Useful for debugging routing in staging.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Usage:[39m
[31m+  *   app.get('/health/vertical', verticalHealthCheck(resolver));[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function verticalHealthCheck(resolver) {[39m
[31m+   return (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+     const hostname = req.hostname || req.headers.host || '';[39m
[31m+     const verticalId = resolver.resolveVerticalId(hostname);[39m
[31m+     const config = resolver.loadVerticalConfig(verticalId);[39m
[31m+     res.json({[39m
[31m+       hostname,[39m
[31m+       verticalId,[39m
[31m+       domain: config.domain,[39m
[31m+       status: config.status,[39m
[31m+       brand: config.brand?.name,[39m
[31m+       env: process.env.HEADY_ENV || 'development',[39m
[31m+       force: process.env.FORCE_VERTICAL || null[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Watch mode (development) ───────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Watch the registry file for changes and auto-invalidate the cache.[39m
[31m+  * Only call this in development environments.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {VerticalResolver} resolver[39m
[31m+  * @returns {{ stop: Function }}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function watchRegistry(resolver) {[39m
[31m+   let watcher = null;[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     watcher = fs.watch(resolver.registryPath, {[39m
[31m+       persistent: false[39m
[31m+     }, eventType => {[39m
[31m+       if (eventType === 'change') {[39m
[31m+         logger.info('[HeadySystems] vertical-registry.json changed — reloading');[39m
[31m+         resolver.invalidateCache();[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+     logger.warn(`[HeadySystems] Could not watch registry file: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   return {[39m
[31m+     stop() {[39m
[31m+       if (watcher) {[39m
[31m+         watcher.close();[39m
[31m+         watcher = null;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /* ─── Exports ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ module.exports = {[39m

[31m+   verticalHealthCheck,[39m

[31m+   deepMerge,[39m
[31m+   normalizeConfig[39m
[31m+ };[39m

[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Heady™ Auth Callback API Route[39m

[31m+  * [39m

[31m+[39m
[31m+ import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';[39m

[31m+ interface AuthCallbackBody {[39m
[31m+   idToken: string;[39m
[31m+   provider: string;[39m
[31m+   displayName: string | null;[39m
[31m+   email: string | null;[39m
[31m+   photoURL: string | null;[39m
[31m+   uid: string;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ export async function POST(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {[39m
[31m+   try {[39m

[31m+     if (!body.idToken || !body.uid) {[39m
[31m+       return NextResponse.json({[39m
[31m+         error: 'Missing idToken or uid'[39m
[31m+       }, {[39m
[31m+         status: 400[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Verify token with Firebase Admin (in production)[39m
[31m+     // For now, trust the client-side Firebase Auth verification[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     const sessionToken = generateSessionToken(body.uid);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Check if user exists in database[39m
[31m+     const existingUser = await lookupUser(body.uid);[39m
[31m+     const isNewUser = !existingUser;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Create or update user record[39m
[31m+     await upsertUser({[39m
[31m+       firebaseUid: body.uid,[39m
[31m+       provider: body.provider,[39m
[31m+       displayName: body.displayName,[39m
[31m+       email: body.email,[39m
[31m+       photoURL: body.photoURL[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Build response[39m
[31m+     const response = NextResponse.json({[39m
[31m+       sessionToken,[39m
[31m+       isNewUser,[39m
[31m+       provider: body.provider[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Set session cookie[39m
[31m+     response.cookies.set(SESSION_COOKIE, sessionToken, {[39m
[31m+       httpOnly: true,[39m
[31m+       secure: true,[39m
[31m+       sameSite: 'lax',[39m
[31m+       maxAge: SESSION_MAX_AGE,[39m
[31m+       path: '/',[39m
[31m+       domain: '.headyme.com' // Accessible across subdomains[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // CRITICAL FIX: Set onboarding state[39m
[31m+     if (isNewUser || !existingUser?.onboardingComplete) {[39m
[31m+       // Determine starting stage[39m
[31m+       const startStage = isNewUser ? OnboardingStage.CREATE_ACCOUNT : existingUser?.lastOnboardingStage ?? OnboardingStage.CREATE_ACCOUNT;[39m
[31m+       const onboardingState = {[39m
[31m+         stage: startStage,[39m
[31m+         stageIndex: Object.values(OnboardingStage).indexOf(startStage),[39m
[31m+         userId: body.uid,[39m
[31m+         provider: body.provider,[39m
[31m+         startedAt: new Date().toISOString()[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+       response.cookies.set(ONBOARDING_COOKIE, JSON.stringify(onboardingState), {[39m
[31m+         httpOnly: false,[39m
[31m+         // Needs to be readable by middleware[39m
[31m+         secure: true,[39m
[31m+         sameSite: 'lax',[39m
[31m+         maxAge: SESSION_MAX_AGE,[39m
[31m+         path: '/',[39m
[31m+         domain: '.headyme.com'[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Log the decision[39m
[31m+     logger.info('[AUTH_CALLBACK]', JSON.stringify({[39m
[31m+       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),[39m
[31m+       uid: body.uid,[39m
[31m+       provider: body.provider,[39m
[31m+       isNewUser,[39m
[31m+       onboardingComplete: existingUser?.onboardingComplete ?? false,[39m
[31m+       action: isNewUser ? 'NEW_USER_ONBOARDING' : 'RETURNING_USER'[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+     return response;[39m
[31m+   } catch (error) {[39m
[31m+     logger.error('[AUTH_CALLBACK_ERROR]', error);[39m
[31m+     return NextResponse.json({[39m
[31m+       error: 'Authentication failed'[39m
[31m+     }, {[39m
[31m+       status: 500[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ export async function DELETE(): Promise<NextResponse> {[39m
[31m+   const response = NextResponse.json({[39m
[31m+     success: true[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   response.cookies.set(SESSION_COOKIE, '', {[39m
[31m+     httpOnly: true,[39m
[31m+     secure: true,[39m
[31m+     maxAge: 0,[39m
[31m+     path: '/',[39m
[31m+     domain: '.headyme.com'[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   response.cookies.set(ONBOARDING_COOKIE, '', {[39m
[31m+     httpOnly: false,[39m
[31m+     secure: true,[39m
[31m+     maxAge: 0,[39m
[31m+     path: '/',[39m
[31m+     domain: '.headyme.com'[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   return response;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Token Validation ─────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Server-side token structure validation.[39m
[31m+  * Verifies the token is a well-formed JWT (3 base64url-encoded parts[39m
[31m+  * with valid JSON header and payload). This does NOT verify the signature —[39m
[31m+  * full verification requires firebase-admin.auth().verifyIdToken().[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function validateTokenStructure(token: string): boolean {[39m
[31m+   const parts = token.split('.');[39m
[31m+   if (parts.length !== 3) return false;[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     JSON.parse(Buffer.from(parts[0], 'base64url').toString());[39m
[31m+     JSON.parse(Buffer.from(parts[1], 'base64url').toString());[39m
[31m+     return true;[39m
[31m+   } catch {[39m
[31m+     return false;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ function generateSessionToken(uid: string): string {[39m
[31m+   // In production: use crypto.randomUUID() + sign with JWT[39m
[31m+   const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36);[39m
[31m+   const random = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15);[39m
[31m+   return `heady_${uid.substring(0, 8)}_${timestamp}_${random}`;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ interface UserRecord {[39m
[31m+   firebaseUid: string;[39m
[31m+   onboardingComplete: boolean;[39m
[31m+   lastOnboardingStage: OnboardingStage | null;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ async function lookupUser(uid: string): Promise<UserRecord | null> {[39m
[31m+   // In production: query Prisma/PostgreSQL[39m
[31m+   // Placeholder for database lookup[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     const response = await fetch(`${process.env.HEADY_API_URL ?? 'https://api.headyapi.com'}/internal/users/${uid}`, {[39m
[31m+       headers: {[39m
[31m+         'Authorization': `Bearer ${process.env.HEADY_INTERNAL_KEY}`,[39m
[31m+         'X-Service': 'heady-onboarding'[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     if (!response.ok) return null;[39m
[31m+     return response.json();[39m
[31m+   } catch {[39m
[31m+     return null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ async function upsertUser(data: {[39m
[31m+   firebaseUid: string;[39m
[31m+   provider: string;[39m
[31m+   displayName: string | null;[39m
[31m+   email: string | null;[39m
[31m+   photoURL: string | null;[39m
[31m+ }): Promise<void> {[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     await fetch(`${process.env.HEADY_API_URL ?? 'https://api.headyapi.com'}/internal/users`, {[39m
[31m+       method: 'PUT',[39m
[31m+       headers: {[39m
[31m+         'Content-Type': 'application/json',[39m
[31m+         'Authorization': `Bearer ${process.env.HEADY_INTERNAL_KEY}`,[39m
[31m+         'X-Service': 'heady-onboarding'[39m
[31m+       },[39m
[31m+       body: JSON.stringify(data)[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   } catch (error) {[39m
[31m+     logger.error('[UPSERT_USER_ERROR]', error);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m

[31m+         userId: body.uid,[39m
[31m+         provider: body.provider,[39m
[31m+         startedAt: new Date().toISOString()[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+       response.cookies.set(ONBOARDING_COOKIE, JSON.stringify(onboardingState), {[39m
[31m+         httpOnly: false,[39m
[31m+         // Needs to be readable by middleware[39m
[31m+         secure: true,[39m
[31m+         sameSite: 'lax',[39m
[31m+         maxAge: SESSION_MAX_AGE,[39m
[31m+         path: '/',[39m
[31m+         domain: '.headyme.com'[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Log the decision[39m
[31m+     logger.info('[AUTH_CALLBACK]', JSON.stringify({[39m
[31m+       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),[39m
[31m+       uid: body.uid,[39m
[31m+       provider: body.provider,[39m
[31m+       isNewUser,[39m
[31m+       onboardingComplete: existingUser?.onboardingComplete ?? false,[39m
[31m+       action: isNewUser ? 'NEW_USER_ONBOARDING' : 'RETURNING_USER'[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+     return response;[39m
[31m+   } catch (error) {[39m
[31m+     logger.error('[AUTH_CALLBACK_ERROR]', error);[39m
[31m+     return NextResponse.json({[39m
[31m+       error: 'Authentication failed'[39m
[31m+     }, {[39m
[31m+       status: 500[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ export async function DELETE(): Promise<NextResponse> {[39m
[31m+   const response = NextResponse.json({[39m
[31m+     success: true[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   response.cookies.set(SESSION_COOKIE, '', {[39m
[31m+     httpOnly: true,[39m
[31m+     secure: true,[39m
[31m+     maxAge: 0,[39m
[31m+     path: '/',[39m
[31m+     domain: '.headyme.com'[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   response.cookies.set(ONBOARDING_COOKIE, '', {[39m
[31m+     httpOnly: false,[39m
[31m+     secure: true,[39m
[31m+     maxAge: 0,[39m
[31m+     path: '/',[39m
[31m+     domain: '.headyme.com'[39m
[31m+   });[39m
[31m+   return response;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Token Validation ─────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Server-side token structure validation.[39m
[31m+  * Verifies the token is a well-formed JWT (3 base64url-encoded parts[39m
[31m+  * with valid JSON header and payload). This does NOT verify the signature —[39m
[31m+  * full verification requires firebase-admin.auth().verifyIdToken().[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function validateTokenStructure(token: string): boolean {[39m
[31m+   const parts = token.split('.');[39m
[31m+   if (parts.length !== 3) return false;[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     JSON.parse(Buffer.from(parts[0], 'base64url').toString());[39m
[31m+     JSON.parse(Buffer.from(parts[1], 'base64url').toString());[39m
[31m+     return true;[39m
[31m+   } catch {[39m
[31m+     return false;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ function generateSessionToken(uid: string): string {[39m
[31m+   // In production: use crypto.randomUUID() + sign with JWT[39m
[31m+   const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36);[39m
[31m+   const random = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15);[39m
[31m+   return `heady_${uid.substring(0, 8)}_${timestamp}_${random}`;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ interface UserRecord {[39m
[31m+   firebaseUid: string;[39m
[31m+   onboardingComplete: boolean;[39m
[31m+   lastOnboardingStage: OnboardingStage | null;[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+ async function lookupUser(uid: string): Promise<UserRecord | null> {[39m

[31m+   // Placeholder for database lookup[39m
[31m+   try {[39m

[31m+ /**[39m

[31m+  * Supports peer management, replication (push / pull / gossip),[39m

[31m+ const DEFAULT_DIMENSIONS = 384;[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_REPLICATION_FACTOR = 2;[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_GOSSIP_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000;[39m

[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── VectorFederation Class ────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * VectorFederation — federated in-memory vector store with peer replication.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @example[39m
[31m+  * const fed = new VectorFederation({ nodeId: 'node-alpha', dimensions: 384 });[39m
[31m+  * fed.addPeer({ id: 'node-beta', endpoint: 'https://beta.headyme.com' });[39m
[31m+  * await fed.upsert({ id: 'v1', embedding: [...], text: 'hello world' });[39m
[31m+  * const results = await fed.search(queryEmbedding, 5);[39m

[31m+ class VectorFederation {[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @param {object} options[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} [options.nodeId]              - This node's unique ID[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.dimensions]          - Embedding dimensionality[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.replicationFactor]   - How many peers to replicate to[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.gossipIntervalMs]    - Gossip sync interval[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.densityGate]         - Minimum cosine similarity threshold[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   constructor({[39m
[31m+     nodeId = `node-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`,[39m
[31m+     dimensions = DEFAULT_DIMENSIONS,[39m
[31m+     replicationFactor = DEFAULT_REPLICATION_FACTOR,[39m
[31m+     gossipIntervalMs = DEFAULT_GOSSIP_INTERVAL_MS,[39m
[31m+     densityGate = DEFAULT_DENSITY_GATE[39m
[31m+   } = {}) {[39m
[31m+     this.nodeId = nodeId;[39m
[31m+     this.dimensions = dimensions;[39m
[31m+     this.replicationFactor = replicationFactor;[39m
[31m+     this.gossipIntervalMs = gossipIntervalMs;[39m
[31m+     this.densityGate = densityGate;[39m
[31m+     this.version = FEDERATION_VERSION;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Map<string, VectorEntry>} */[39m
[31m+     this._store = new Map();[39m
[31m+[39m
