[31m+     this._peers = new Map();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Array<{action: string, id: string, timestamp: number, peer?: string}>} */[39m
[31m+     this._replicationLog = [];[39m
[31m+     this._gossipTimer = null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Store Operations ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Insert or update a vector entry.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {VectorEntry} entry[39m
[31m+    * @throws {TypeError} If entry.embedding length doesn't match dimensions[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async upsert(entry) {[39m
[31m+     if (!entry?.id) throw new TypeError('upsert: entry.id is required');[39m
[31m+     if (!Array.isArray(entry.embedding) || entry.embedding.length !== this.dimensions) {[39m
[31m+       throw new TypeError(`upsert: entry.embedding must be an array of ${this.dimensions} numbers ` + `(got ${Array.isArray(entry.embedding) ? entry.embedding.length : typeof entry.embedding})`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     const record = {[39m
[31m+       ...entry,[39m
[31m+       timestamp: entry.timestamp || Date.now()[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     this._store.set(entry.id, record);[39m
[31m+     this._logReplication('upsert', entry.id);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Replicate to peers asynchronously (fire-and-forget)[39m
[31m+     this._replicateToPeers('push', record).catch(err => {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[VectorFederation] Push replication failed for ${entry.id}:`, err.message);[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     return record;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Get a vector entry by ID.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} id[39m
[31m+    * @returns {VectorEntry|null}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   get(id) {[39m
[31m+     return this._store.get(id) || null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Delete a vector entry.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} id[39m
[31m+    * @returns {boolean} True if deleted[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   delete(id) {[39m
[31m+     const existed = this._store.has(id);[39m
[31m+     this._store.delete(id);[39m
[31m+     if (existed) this._logReplication('delete', id);[39m
[31m+     return existed;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Return the number of stored vectors.[39m
[31m+    * @returns {number}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   get size() {[39m
[31m+     return this._store.size;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Search ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Perform approximate nearest-neighbor search using cosine similarity.[39m
[31m+    * Applies the density gate as a minimum similarity threshold.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} queryEmbedding  - Query vector (must match this.dimensions)[39m
[31m+    * @param {number}   [k=10]          - Number of results[39m
[31m+    * @param {boolean}  [federated=false] - Also query peer nodes[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Promise<Array<{id: string, score: number, entry: VectorEntry}>>}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async search(queryEmbedding, k = DEFAULT_SEARCH_K, federated = false) {[39m
[31m+     if (!Array.isArray(queryEmbedding) || queryEmbedding.length !== this.dimensions) {[39m
[31m+       throw new TypeError(`search: queryEmbedding must be an array of ${this.dimensions} numbers`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     const localResults = this._localSearch(queryEmbedding, k);[39m
[31m+     if (!federated || this._peers.size === 0) {[39m
[31m+       return localResults;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Federated search: query active peers ──────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     const peerResults = await this._federatedSearch(queryEmbedding, k);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Merge, deduplicate, re-rank by score[39m
[31m+     const merged = new Map();[39m
[31m+     for (const result of [...localResults, ...peerResults]) {[39m
[31m+       const existing = merged.get(result.id);[39m
[31m+       if (!existing || result.score > existing.score) {[39m
[31m+         merged.set(result.id, result);[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return Array.from(merged.values()).sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score).slice(0, k);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} queryEmbedding[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} k[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Array<{id: string, score: number, entry: VectorEntry}>}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _localSearch(queryEmbedding, k) {[39m
[31m+     const results = [];[39m
[31m+     const qNorm = this._norm(queryEmbedding);[39m
[31m+     for (const [id, entry] of this._store) {[39m
[31m+       const score = this._cosine(queryEmbedding, entry.embedding, qNorm);[39m
[31m+       if (score >= this.densityGate) {[39m
[31m+         results.push({[39m
[31m+           id,[39m
[31m+           score,[39m
[31m+           entry[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return results.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score).slice(0, k);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Peer Management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Register a peer node.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {{ id: string, endpoint: string }} peer[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   addPeer(peer) {[39m
[31m+     if (!peer?.id || !peer?.endpoint) {[39m
[31m+       throw new TypeError('addPeer: peer.id and peer.endpoint are required');[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     this._peers.set(peer.id, {[39m
[31m+       id: peer.id,[39m
[31m+       endpoint: peer.endpoint.replace(/\/$/, ''),[39m
[31m+       active: true,[39m
[31m+       lastSeen: Date.now(),[39m
[31m+       vectorCount: 0[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Remove a peer node.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} peerId[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   removePeer(peerId) {[39m
[31m+     this._peers.delete(peerId);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Get all registered peers.[39m
[31m+    * @returns {PeerNode[]}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   getPeers() {[39m
[31m+     return Array.from(this._peers.values());[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Replication ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Pull all vectors from a peer node.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} peerId[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Promise<number>} Number of vectors received[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async pullFromPeer(peerId) {[39m
[31m+     const peer = this._peers.get(peerId);[39m
[31m+     if (!peer) throw new Error(`Unknown peer: ${peerId}`);[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       const res = await fetch(`${peer.endpoint}/api/vectors/export`, {[39m
[31m+         headers: {[39m
[31m+           'X-Heady-Node': this.nodeId[39m
[31m+         },[39m
[31m+         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15_000)[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+       if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);[39m
[31m+       const data = await res.json();[39m
[31m+       const entries = data?.vectors || [];[39m
[31m+       let count = 0;[39m
[31m+       for (const entry of entries) {[39m
[31m+         if (entry?.id && Array.isArray(entry.embedding) && entry.embedding.length === this.dimensions) {[39m
[31m+           this._store.set(entry.id, entry);[39m
[31m+           count++;[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       peer.lastSeen = Date.now();[39m
[31m+       peer.vectorCount = entries.length;[39m
[31m+       peer.active = true;[39m
[31m+       this._logReplication('pull', `${count} vectors`, peerId);[39m
[31m+       return count;[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       peer.active = false;[39m
[31m+       throw new Error(`Pull from peer ${peerId} failed: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Start the gossip sync loop (pushes incremental updates to random peers).[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   startGossip() {[39m
[31m+     if (this._gossipTimer) return;[39m
[31m+     this._gossipTimer = setInterval(() => {[39m
[31m+       this._gossipCycle().catch(err => {[39m
[31m+         logger.warn('[VectorFederation] Gossip cycle error:', err.message);[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }, this.gossipIntervalMs);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Stop the gossip sync loop.[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   stopGossip() {[39m
[31m+     if (this._gossipTimer) {[39m
[31m+       clearInterval(this._gossipTimer);[39m
[31m+       this._gossipTimer = null;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Express Routes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Register this federation's REST API routes on an Express app.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * Endpoints:[39m
[31m+    *  POST /api/vectors/upsert       — Add/update a vector[39m
[31m+    *  GET  /api/vectors/export       — Export all vectors[39m
[31m+    *  POST /api/vectors/search       — Semantic search[39m
[31m+    *  GET  /api/vectors/peers        — List peers[39m
[31m+    *  POST /api/vectors/peers        — Add a peer[39m
[31m+    *  DELETE /api/vectors/peers/:id  — Remove a peer[39m
[31m+    *  GET  /api/vectors/stats        — Federation stats[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {import('express').Application} app[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} [prefix='/api/vectors'][39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   registerRoutes(app, prefix = '/api/vectors') {[39m
[31m+     app.post(`${prefix}/upsert`, async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const entry = await this.upsert(req.body);[39m
[31m+         res.json({[39m
[31m+           ok: true,[39m
[31m+           id: entry.id[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({[39m
[31m+           ok: false,[39m
[31m+           error: err.message[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.get(`${prefix}/export`, (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.json({[39m
[31m+         nodeId: this.nodeId,[39m
[31m+         vectors: Array.from(this._store.values()),[39m
[31m+         count: this._store.size,[39m
[31m+         timestamp: Date.now()[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.post(`${prefix}/search`, async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const {[39m
[31m+           embedding,[39m
[31m+           k = DEFAULT_SEARCH_K,[39m
[31m+           federated = false[39m
[31m+         } = req.body;[39m
[31m+         const results = await this.search(embedding, k, federated);[39m
[31m+         res.json({[39m
[31m+           ok: true,[39m
[31m+           results,[39m
[31m+           count: results.length[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({[39m
[31m+           ok: false,[39m
[31m+           error: err.message[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.get(`${prefix}/peers`, (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.json({[39m
[31m+         peers: this.getPeers()[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.post(`${prefix}/peers`, (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         this.addPeer(req.body);[39m
[31m+         res.json({[39m
[31m+           ok: true[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({[39m
[31m+           ok: false,[39m
[31m+           error: err.message[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.delete(`${prefix}/peers/:id`, (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       this.removePeer(req.params.id);[39m
[31m+       res.json({[39m
[31m+         ok: true[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.get(`${prefix}/stats`, (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.json(this.getStats());[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Return a summary of federation state.[39m
[31m+    * @returns {object}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   getStats() {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active).length;[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       nodeId: this.nodeId,[39m
[31m+       version: this.version,[39m
[31m+       vectorCount: this._store.size,[39m
[31m+       dimensions: this.dimensions,[39m
[31m+       densityGate: this.densityGate,[39m
[31m+       replicationFactor: this.replicationFactor,[39m
[31m+       totalPeers: this._peers.size,[39m
[31m+       activePeers,[39m
[31m+       gossipActive: this._gossipTimer !== null,[39m
[31m+       replicationLogSize: this._replicationLog.length[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Get the replication log.[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [limit=100][39m
[31m+    * @returns {Array<object>}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   getReplicationLog(limit = 100) {[39m
[31m+     return this._replicationLog.slice(-limit);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Private Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} a[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} b[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [aNorm][39m
[31m+    * @returns {number}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _cosine(a, b, aNorm) {[39m
[31m+     let dot = 0;[39m
[31m+     let normA = aNorm || 0;[39m
[31m+     let normB = 0;[39m
[31m+     for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {[39m
[31m+       dot += a[i] * b[i];[39m
[31m+       if (!aNorm) normA += a[i] * a[i];[39m
[31m+       normB += b[i] * b[i];[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     if (!aNorm) normA = Math.sqrt(normA);[39m
[31m+     normB = Math.sqrt(normB);[39m
[31m+     if (normA === 0 || normB === 0) return 0;[39m
[31m+     return dot / (normA * normB);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} v[39m
[31m+    * @returns {number}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _norm(v) {[39m
[31m+     let sum = 0;[39m
[31m+     for (const x of v) sum += x * x;[39m
[31m+     return Math.sqrt(sum);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _logReplication(action, id, peer = null) {[39m
[31m+     this._replicationLog.push({[39m
[31m+       action,[39m
[31m+       id,[39m
[31m+       timestamp: Date.now(),[39m
[31m+       ...(peer ? {[39m
[31m+         peer[39m
[31m+       } : {})[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     // Cap log at 1000 entries[39m
[31m+     if (this._replicationLog.length > 1000) {[39m
[31m+       this._replicationLog.shift();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async _replicateToPeers(mode, entry) {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active);[39m
[31m+     if (activePeers.length === 0) return;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Pick up to replicationFactor random peers[39m
[31m+     const targets = activePeers.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, this.replicationFactor);[39m
[31m+     await Promise.allSettled(targets.map(async peer => {[39m
[31m+       const res = await fetch(`${peer.endpoint}/api/vectors/upsert`, {[39m
[31m+         method: 'POST',[39m
[31m+         headers: {[39m
[31m+           'Content-Type': 'application/json',[39m
[31m+           'X-Heady-Node': this.nodeId[39m
[31m+         },[39m
[31m+         body: JSON.stringify(entry),[39m
[31m+         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000)[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+       if (res.ok) {[39m
[31m+         this._logReplication('push-ok', entry.id, peer.id);[39m
[31m+         peer.lastSeen = Date.now();[39m
[31m+         peer.active = true;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async _gossipCycle() {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active);[39m
[31m+     if (activePeers.length === 0) return;[39m
[31m+     const target = activePeers[Math.floor(Math.random() * activePeers.length)];[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       await this.pullFromPeer(target.id);[39m
[31m+       this._logReplication('gossip-pull', `from ${target.id}`);[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[VectorFederation] Gossip pull failed from ${target.id}:`, err.message);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async _federatedSearch(queryEmbedding, k) {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active);[39m
[31m+     const allResults = [];[39m
[31m+     const peerSearches = activePeers.map(async peer => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const res = await fetch(`${peer.endpoint}/api/vectors/search`, {[39m
[31m+           method: 'POST',[39m
[31m+           headers: {[39m
[31m+             'Content-Type': 'application/json',[39m
[31m+             'X-Heady-Node': this.nodeId[39m
[31m+           },[39m
[31m+           body: JSON.stringify({[39m
[31m+             embedding: queryEmbedding,[39m
[31m+             k,[39m
[31m+             federated: false[39m
[31m+           }),[39m
[31m+           signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000)[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+         if (!res.ok) return;[39m
[31m+         const data = await res.json();[39m
[31m+         if (Array.isArray(data?.results)) {[39m
[31m+           allResults.push(...data.results);[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         peer.active = false;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     await Promise.allSettled(peerSearches);[39m
[31m+     return allResults;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Exports ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ module.exports = {[39m
[31m+   VectorFederation,[39m
[31m+   FEDERATION_VERSION[39m
[31m+ };[39m

[31m+ const { createLogger } = require('../../utils/logger');[39m
[31m+ const logger = createLogger('auto-fixed');[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * HeadyWeb — VectorFederation[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Federates vector memory across HeadyStack instances.[39m
[31m+  * Supports peer management, replication (push / pull / gossip),[39m
[31m+  * federated semantic search, and Express route integration.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * © 2026 Heady™Systems Inc. PROPRIETARY AND CONFIDENTIAL.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @module vector-federation[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ 'use strict';[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Constants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const FEDERATION_VERSION = '2.1.0';[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_DIMENSIONS = 384;[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_REPLICATION_FACTOR = 2;[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_GOSSIP_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000;[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_DENSITY_GATE = 0.92;[39m
[31m+ const DEFAULT_SEARCH_K = 10;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Types / JSDoc ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * @typedef {object} VectorEntry[39m
[31m+  * @property {string}   id          - Unique vector ID[39m
[31m+  * @property {number[]} embedding   - Dense embedding (DEFAULT_DIMENSIONS floats)[39m
[31m+  * @property {string}   [text]      - Original text (optional)[39m
[31m+  * @property {object}   [metadata]  - Arbitrary metadata[39m
[31m+  * @property {number}   timestamp   - Unix ms timestamp[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * @typedef {object} PeerNode[39m
[31m+  * @property {string}  id          - Peer node ID[39m
[31m+  * @property {string}  endpoint    - HTTP base URL[39m
[31m+  * @property {boolean} active      - Whether peer is reachable[39m
[31m+  * @property {number}  lastSeen    - Unix ms timestamp[39m
[31m+  * @property {number}  vectorCount - Reported count from last ping[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── VectorFederation Class ────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * VectorFederation — federated in-memory vector store with peer replication.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @example[39m
[31m+  * const fed = new VectorFederation({ nodeId: 'node-alpha', dimensions: 384 });[39m
[31m+  * fed.addPeer({ id: 'node-beta', endpoint: 'https://beta.headyme.com' });[39m
[31m+  * await fed.upsert({ id: 'v1', embedding: [...], text: 'hello world' });[39m
[31m+  * const results = await fed.search(queryEmbedding, 5);[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ class VectorFederation {[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @param {object} options[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} [options.nodeId]              - This node's unique ID[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.dimensions]          - Embedding dimensionality[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.replicationFactor]   - How many peers to replicate to[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.gossipIntervalMs]    - Gossip sync interval[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [options.densityGate]         - Minimum cosine similarity threshold[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   constructor({[39m
[31m+     nodeId = `node-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`,[39m
[31m+     dimensions = DEFAULT_DIMENSIONS,[39m
[31m+     replicationFactor = DEFAULT_REPLICATION_FACTOR,[39m
[31m+     gossipIntervalMs = DEFAULT_GOSSIP_INTERVAL_MS,[39m
[31m+     densityGate = DEFAULT_DENSITY_GATE[39m
[31m+   } = {}) {[39m
[31m+     this.nodeId = nodeId;[39m
[31m+     this.dimensions = dimensions;[39m
[31m+     this.replicationFactor = replicationFactor;[39m
[31m+     this.gossipIntervalMs = gossipIntervalMs;[39m
[31m+     this.densityGate = densityGate;[39m
[31m+     this.version = FEDERATION_VERSION;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Map<string, VectorEntry>} */[39m
[31m+     this._store = new Map();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Map<string, PeerNode>} */[39m
[31m+     this._peers = new Map();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     /** @type {Array<{action: string, id: string, timestamp: number, peer?: string}>} */[39m
[31m+     this._replicationLog = [];[39m
[31m+     this._gossipTimer = null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Store Operations ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Insert or update a vector entry.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {VectorEntry} entry[39m
[31m+    * @throws {TypeError} If entry.embedding length doesn't match dimensions[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async upsert(entry) {[39m
[31m+     if (!entry?.id) throw new TypeError('upsert: entry.id is required');[39m
[31m+     if (!Array.isArray(entry.embedding) || entry.embedding.length !== this.dimensions) {[39m
[31m+       throw new TypeError(`upsert: entry.embedding must be an array of ${this.dimensions} numbers ` + `(got ${Array.isArray(entry.embedding) ? entry.embedding.length : typeof entry.embedding})`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     const record = {[39m
[31m+       ...entry,[39m
[31m+       timestamp: entry.timestamp || Date.now()[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+     this._store.set(entry.id, record);[39m
[31m+     this._logReplication('upsert', entry.id);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Replicate to peers asynchronously (fire-and-forget)[39m
[31m+     this._replicateToPeers('push', record).catch(err => {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[VectorFederation] Push replication failed for ${entry.id}:`, err.message);[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     return record;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Get a vector entry by ID.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} id[39m
[31m+    * @returns {VectorEntry|null}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   get(id) {[39m
[31m+     return this._store.get(id) || null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Delete a vector entry.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} id[39m
[31m+    * @returns {boolean} True if deleted[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   delete(id) {[39m
[31m+     const existed = this._store.has(id);[39m
[31m+     this._store.delete(id);[39m
[31m+     if (existed) this._logReplication('delete', id);[39m
[31m+     return existed;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Return the number of stored vectors.[39m
[31m+    * @returns {number}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   get size() {[39m
[31m+     return this._store.size;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Search ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Perform approximate nearest-neighbor search using cosine similarity.[39m
[31m+    * Applies the density gate as a minimum similarity threshold.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} queryEmbedding  - Query vector (must match this.dimensions)[39m
[31m+    * @param {number}   [k=10]          - Number of results[39m
[31m+    * @param {boolean}  [federated=false] - Also query peer nodes[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Promise<Array<{id: string, score: number, entry: VectorEntry}>>}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async search(queryEmbedding, k = DEFAULT_SEARCH_K, federated = false) {[39m
[31m+     if (!Array.isArray(queryEmbedding) || queryEmbedding.length !== this.dimensions) {[39m
[31m+       throw new TypeError(`search: queryEmbedding must be an array of ${this.dimensions} numbers`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     const localResults = this._localSearch(queryEmbedding, k);[39m
[31m+     if (!federated || this._peers.size === 0) {[39m
[31m+       return localResults;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // ── Federated search: query active peers ──────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+     const peerResults = await this._federatedSearch(queryEmbedding, k);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Merge, deduplicate, re-rank by score[39m
[31m+     const merged = new Map();[39m
[31m+     for (const result of [...localResults, ...peerResults]) {[39m
[31m+       const existing = merged.get(result.id);[39m
[31m+       if (!existing || result.score > existing.score) {[39m
[31m+         merged.set(result.id, result);[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return Array.from(merged.values()).sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score).slice(0, k);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} queryEmbedding[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} k[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Array<{id: string, score: number, entry: VectorEntry}>}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _localSearch(queryEmbedding, k) {[39m
[31m+     const results = [];[39m
[31m+     const qNorm = this._norm(queryEmbedding);[39m
[31m+     for (const [id, entry] of this._store) {[39m
[31m+       const score = this._cosine(queryEmbedding, entry.embedding, qNorm);[39m
[31m+       if (score >= this.densityGate) {[39m
[31m+         results.push({[39m
[31m+           id,[39m
[31m+           score,[39m
[31m+           entry[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return results.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score).slice(0, k);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Peer Management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Register a peer node.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {{ id: string, endpoint: string }} peer[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   addPeer(peer) {[39m
[31m+     if (!peer?.id || !peer?.endpoint) {[39m
[31m+       throw new TypeError('addPeer: peer.id and peer.endpoint are required');[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     this._peers.set(peer.id, {[39m
[31m+       id: peer.id,[39m
[31m+       endpoint: peer.endpoint.replace(/\/$/, ''),[39m
[31m+       active: true,[39m
[31m+       lastSeen: Date.now(),[39m
[31m+       vectorCount: 0[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Remove a peer node.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} peerId[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   removePeer(peerId) {[39m
[31m+     this._peers.delete(peerId);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Get all registered peers.[39m
[31m+    * @returns {PeerNode[]}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   getPeers() {[39m
[31m+     return Array.from(this._peers.values());[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Replication ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Pull all vectors from a peer node.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} peerId[39m
[31m+    * @returns {Promise<number>} Number of vectors received[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async pullFromPeer(peerId) {[39m
[31m+     const peer = this._peers.get(peerId);[39m
[31m+     if (!peer) throw new Error(`Unknown peer: ${peerId}`);[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       const res = await fetch(`${peer.endpoint}/api/vectors/export`, {[39m
[31m+         headers: {[39m
[31m+           'X-Heady-Node': this.nodeId[39m
[31m+         },[39m
[31m+         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15_000)[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+       if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);[39m
[31m+       const data = await res.json();[39m
[31m+       const entries = data?.vectors || [];[39m
[31m+       let count = 0;[39m
[31m+       for (const entry of entries) {[39m
[31m+         if (entry?.id && Array.isArray(entry.embedding) && entry.embedding.length === this.dimensions) {[39m
[31m+           this._store.set(entry.id, entry);[39m
[31m+           count++;[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       peer.lastSeen = Date.now();[39m
[31m+       peer.vectorCount = entries.length;[39m
[31m+       peer.active = true;[39m
[31m+       this._logReplication('pull', `${count} vectors`, peerId);[39m
[31m+       return count;[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       peer.active = false;[39m
[31m+       throw new Error(`Pull from peer ${peerId} failed: ${err.message}`);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Start the gossip sync loop (pushes incremental updates to random peers).[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   startGossip() {[39m
[31m+     if (this._gossipTimer) return;[39m
[31m+     this._gossipTimer = setInterval(() => {[39m
[31m+       this._gossipCycle().catch(err => {[39m
[31m+         logger.warn('[VectorFederation] Gossip cycle error:', err.message);[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }, this.gossipIntervalMs);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Stop the gossip sync loop.[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   stopGossip() {[39m
[31m+     if (this._gossipTimer) {[39m
[31m+       clearInterval(this._gossipTimer);[39m
[31m+       this._gossipTimer = null;[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Express Routes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Register this federation's REST API routes on an Express app.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * Endpoints:[39m
[31m+    *  POST /api/vectors/upsert       — Add/update a vector[39m
[31m+    *  GET  /api/vectors/export       — Export all vectors[39m
[31m+    *  POST /api/vectors/search       — Semantic search[39m
[31m+    *  GET  /api/vectors/peers        — List peers[39m
[31m+    *  POST /api/vectors/peers        — Add a peer[39m
[31m+    *  DELETE /api/vectors/peers/:id  — Remove a peer[39m
[31m+    *  GET  /api/vectors/stats        — Federation stats[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {import('express').Application} app[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} [prefix='/api/vectors'][39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   registerRoutes(app, prefix = '/api/vectors') {[39m
[31m+     app.post(`${prefix}/upsert`, async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const entry = await this.upsert(req.body);[39m
[31m+         res.json({[39m
[31m+           ok: true,[39m
[31m+           id: entry.id[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({[39m
[31m+           ok: false,[39m
[31m+           error: err.message[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.get(`${prefix}/export`, (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.json({[39m
[31m+         nodeId: this.nodeId,[39m
[31m+         vectors: Array.from(this._store.values()),[39m
[31m+         count: this._store.size,[39m
[31m+         timestamp: Date.now()[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.post(`${prefix}/search`, async (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const {[39m
[31m+           embedding,[39m
[31m+           k = DEFAULT_SEARCH_K,[39m
[31m+           federated = false[39m
[31m+         } = req.body;[39m
[31m+         const results = await this.search(embedding, k, federated);[39m
[31m+         res.json({[39m
[31m+           ok: true,[39m
[31m+           results,[39m
[31m+           count: results.length[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({[39m
[31m+           ok: false,[39m
[31m+           error: err.message[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.get(`${prefix}/peers`, (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.json({[39m
[31m+         peers: this.getPeers()[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.post(`${prefix}/peers`, (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         this.addPeer(req.body);[39m
[31m+         res.json({[39m
[31m+           ok: true[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         res.status(400).json({[39m
[31m+           ok: false,[39m
[31m+           error: err.message[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.delete(`${prefix}/peers/:id`, (req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       this.removePeer(req.params.id);[39m
[31m+       res.json({[39m
[31m+         ok: true[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     app.get(`${prefix}/stats`, (_req, res) => {[39m
[31m+       res.json(this.getStats());[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Return a summary of federation state.[39m
[31m+    * @returns {object}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   getStats() {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active).length;[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       nodeId: this.nodeId,[39m
[31m+       version: this.version,[39m
[31m+       vectorCount: this._store.size,[39m
[31m+       dimensions: this.dimensions,[39m
[31m+       densityGate: this.densityGate,[39m
[31m+       replicationFactor: this.replicationFactor,[39m
[31m+       totalPeers: this._peers.size,[39m
[31m+       activePeers,[39m
[31m+       gossipActive: this._gossipTimer !== null,[39m
[31m+       replicationLogSize: this._replicationLog.length[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Get the replication log.[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [limit=100][39m
[31m+    * @returns {Array<object>}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   getReplicationLog(limit = 100) {[39m
[31m+     return this._replicationLog.slice(-limit);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // ── Private Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} a[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} b[39m
[31m+    * @param {number} [aNorm][39m
[31m+    * @returns {number}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _cosine(a, b, aNorm) {[39m
[31m+     let dot = 0;[39m
[31m+     let normA = aNorm || 0;[39m
[31m+     let normB = 0;[39m
[31m+     for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {[39m
[31m+       dot += a[i] * b[i];[39m
[31m+       if (!aNorm) normA += a[i] * a[i];[39m
[31m+       normB += b[i] * b[i];[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     if (!aNorm) normA = Math.sqrt(normA);[39m
[31m+     normB = Math.sqrt(normB);[39m
[31m+     if (normA === 0 || normB === 0) return 0;[39m
[31m+     return dot / (normA * normB);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    * @param {number[]} v[39m
[31m+    * @returns {number}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _norm(v) {[39m
[31m+     let sum = 0;[39m
[31m+     for (const x of v) sum += x * x;[39m
[31m+     return Math.sqrt(sum);[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   _logReplication(action, id, peer = null) {[39m
[31m+     this._replicationLog.push({[39m
[31m+       action,[39m
[31m+       id,[39m
[31m+       timestamp: Date.now(),[39m
[31m+       ...(peer ? {[39m
[31m+         peer[39m
[31m+       } : {})[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     // Cap log at 1000 entries[39m
[31m+     if (this._replicationLog.length > 1000) {[39m
[31m+       this._replicationLog.shift();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async _replicateToPeers(mode, entry) {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active);[39m
[31m+     if (activePeers.length === 0) return;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Pick up to replicationFactor random peers[39m
[31m+     const targets = activePeers.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, this.replicationFactor);[39m
[31m+     await Promise.allSettled(targets.map(async peer => {[39m
[31m+       const res = await fetch(`${peer.endpoint}/api/vectors/upsert`, {[39m
[31m+         method: 'POST',[39m
[31m+         headers: {[39m
[31m+           'Content-Type': 'application/json',[39m
[31m+           'X-Heady-Node': this.nodeId[39m
[31m+         },[39m
[31m+         body: JSON.stringify(entry),[39m
[31m+         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000)[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+       if (res.ok) {[39m
[31m+         this._logReplication('push-ok', entry.id, peer.id);[39m
[31m+         peer.lastSeen = Date.now();[39m
[31m+         peer.active = true;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }));[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async _gossipCycle() {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active);[39m
[31m+     if (activePeers.length === 0) return;[39m
[31m+     const target = activePeers[Math.floor(Math.random() * activePeers.length)];[39m
[31m+     try {[39m
[31m+       await this.pullFromPeer(target.id);[39m
[31m+       this._logReplication('gossip-pull', `from ${target.id}`);[39m
[31m+     } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn(`[VectorFederation] Gossip pull failed from ${target.id}:`, err.message);[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * @private[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   async _federatedSearch(queryEmbedding, k) {[39m
[31m+     const activePeers = Array.from(this._peers.values()).filter(p => p.active);[39m
[31m+     const allResults = [];[39m
[31m+     const peerSearches = activePeers.map(async peer => {[39m
[31m+       try {[39m
[31m+         const res = await fetch(`${peer.endpoint}/api/vectors/search`, {[39m
[31m+           method: 'POST',[39m
[31m+           headers: {[39m
[31m+             'Content-Type': 'application/json',[39m
[31m+             'X-Heady-Node': this.nodeId[39m
[31m+           },[39m
[31m+           body: JSON.stringify({[39m
[31m+             embedding: queryEmbedding,[39m
[31m+             k,[39m
[31m+             federated: false[39m
[31m+           }),[39m
[31m+           signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5_000)[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+         if (!res.ok) return;[39m
[31m+         const data = await res.json();[39m
[31m+         if (Array.isArray(data?.results)) {[39m
[31m+           allResults.push(...data.results);[39m
[31m+         }[39m
[31m+       } catch (err) {[39m
[31m+         peer.active = false;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     await Promise.allSettled(peerSearches);[39m
[31m+     return allResults;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ── Exports ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ module.exports = {[39m
[31m+   VectorFederation,[39m
[31m+   FEDERATION_VERSION[39m
[31m+ };[39m

[31m+ function buildHostRemotes() {[39m

[31m+     remotes[cfg.scope] = `promise new Promise((resolve, reject) => {[39m
[31m+       const url = window.__HEADY_REMOTES__?.['${name}'] || '/remotes/${name}/remoteEntry.js';[39m
[31m+       const script = document.createElement('script');[39m

[31m+       document.head.appendChild(script);[39m

 FAIL  tests/production-hardening-batch6.test.js > shared CORS policy wildcard removal > public API path reflects validated origin instead of wildcard
AssertionError: expected '/**\n * Advanced CORS Policy Middlewa…' to contain 'event: \'cors_public_blocked\''

[32m- Expected[39m
[31m+ Received[39m

[32m- event: 'cors_public_blocked'[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Advanced CORS Policy Middleware[39m
[31m+  * @module security-middleware/cors-policy[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * Features:[39m
[31m+  *  - Allowlist of all HeadyMe domains[39m
[31m+  *  - Per-route CORS overrides[39m
[31m+  *  - Preflight caching (max-age: 86400)[39m
[31m+  *  - credentials: true only for first-party domains[39m
[31m+  *  - Full method set: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, OPTIONS[39m
[31m+  *  - Exposed headers: X-Request-ID, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-Circuit-State[39m
[31m+  *  - Origin validation with subdomain support[39m
[31m+  *  - Environment-aware (dev mode allows localhost)[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ 'use strict';[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ const {[39m
[31m+   createLogger[39m
[31m+ } = require('../utils/logger');[39m
[31m+ const logger = createLogger('cors-policy');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── HEADY CORS WHITELIST ────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const HEADY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS = new Set(['https://headyme.com', 'https://headysystems.com', 'https://headyconnection.org', 'https://headyconnection.com', 'https://headybuddy.org', 'https://headymcp.com', 'https://headyapi.com', 'https://headyio.com', 'https://headyos.com', 'https://headyweb.com', 'https://headybot.com', 'https://headycloud.com', 'https://headybee.co', 'https://heady-ai.com', 'https://headyex.com', 'https://headyfinance.com', 'https://admin.headysystems.com', 'https://auth.headysystems.com', 'https://api.headysystems.com']);[39m
[31m+ const _isHeadyOrigin = o => !o ? false : HEADY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.has(o) || /\.run\.app$/.test(o) || process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && /^https?:\/\/(localhost|127\.0\.0\.1):/.test(o);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Allowed Origins ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // All HeadyMe first-party domains — credentials: true is safe for these[39m
[31m+ const FIRST_PARTY_DOMAINS = ['headyme.com', 'headysystems.com', 'headymcp.com', 'headybuddy.org', 'headyconnection.org', 'headyapi.com', 'headybot.com', 'headyos.com', 'headyio.com'];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Third-party domains — allowed but no credentials[39m
[31m+ const THIRD_PARTY_DOMAINS = [[39m
[31m+   // Add partner/integration domains here[39m
[31m+ ];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Allowed HTTP methods[39m
[31m+ const ALLOWED_METHODS = ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH', 'OPTIONS', 'HEAD'];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Exposed response headers[39m
[31m+ const EXPOSED_HEADERS = ['X-Request-ID', 'X-RateLimit-Remaining', 'X-RateLimit-Limit', 'X-RateLimit-Reset', 'X-Circuit-State', 'X-Processing-Purpose', 'X-Legal-Basis', 'X-Session-Expires-In', 'Content-Disposition', 'X-Checksum-SHA256'];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Allowed request headers[39m
[31m+ const ALLOWED_HEADERS = ['Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'X-Request-ID', 'X-Session-ID', 'X-API-Key', 'X-Tenant-ID', 'X-Access-Purpose', 'X-Data-Destination-Country', 'Accept', 'Accept-Language', 'Cache-Control', 'If-None-Match', 'If-Modified-Since'];[39m
[31m+ const PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE = 86400; // 24 hours[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Origin Validator ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Determine if an origin is allowed and whether credentials should be permitted.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {string} origin[39m
[31m+  * @param {object} opts[39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.additionalDomains] - Extra allowed domains[39m
[31m+  * @param {boolean} [opts.allowLocalhost]     - Allow localhost/0.0.0.0 (dev)[39m
[31m+  * @returns {{ allowed: boolean, credentials: boolean, matchedDomain: string|null }}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function validateOrigin(origin, opts = {}) {[39m
[31m+   if (!origin) return {[39m
[31m+     allowed: false,[39m
[31m+     credentials: false,[39m
[31m+     matchedDomain: null[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+   let hostname;[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     hostname = new URL(origin).hostname;[39m
[31m+   } catch {[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       allowed: false,[39m
[31m+       credentials: false,[39m
[31m+       matchedDomain: null[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // Dev: allow localhost[39m
[31m+   if (opts.allowLocalhost && (hostname === "0.0.0.0" || hostname === process.env.REMOTE_HOST || '0.0.0.0' || hostname.endsWith('.local'))) {[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       allowed: true,[39m
[31m+       credentials: true,[39m
[31m+       matchedDomain: hostname[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // First-party domains (exact + subdomain match)[39m
[31m+   for (const domain of FIRST_PARTY_DOMAINS) {[39m
[31m+     if (hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)) {[39m
[31m+       return {[39m
[31m+         allowed: true,[39m
[31m+         credentials: true,[39m
[31m+         matchedDomain: domain[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // Additional first-party domains from config[39m
[31m+   for (const domain of opts.additionalDomains || []) {[39m
[31m+     if (hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)) {[39m
[31m+       return {[39m
[31m+         allowed: true,[39m
[31m+         credentials: true,[39m
[31m+         matchedDomain: domain[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // Third-party domains (no credentials)[39m
[31m+   for (const domain of THIRD_PARTY_DOMAINS) {[39m
[31m+     if (hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)) {[39m
[31m+       return {[39m
[31m+         allowed: true,[39m
[31m+         credentials: false,[39m
[31m+         matchedDomain: domain[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   return {[39m
[31m+     allowed: false,[39m
[31m+     credentials: false,[39m
[31m+     matchedDomain: null[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Route-Level Override Registry ───────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ class CORSRouteRegistry {[39m
[31m+   constructor() {[39m
[31m+     this._routes = new Map(); // pattern → options[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Register per-route CORS override.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string|RegExp} pattern    - Route path or regex[39m
[31m+    * @param {object} corsOptions       - Per-route CORS options[39m
[31m+    * @param {string[]} [corsOptions.origins]       - Additional allowed origins[39m
[31m+    * @param {string[]} [corsOptions.methods]       - Override allowed methods[39m
[31m+    * @param {boolean}  [corsOptions.credentials]  - Override credentials flag[39m
[31m+    * @param {string[]} [corsOptions.exposedHeaders] - Additional exposed headers[39m
[31m+    * @param {boolean}  [corsOptions.allowAll]      - Allow * (public API, no credentials)[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   register(pattern, corsOptions) {[39m
[31m+     this._routes.set(pattern, corsOptions);[39m
[31m+     return this;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Find override matching a path.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} path[39m
[31m+    * @returns {object|null}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   find(path) {[39m
[31m+     for (const [pattern, opts] of this._routes) {[39m
[31m+       if (pattern instanceof RegExp) {[39m
[31m+         if (pattern.test(path)) return opts;[39m
[31m+       } else if (typeof pattern === 'string') {[39m
[31m+         if (path === pattern || path.startsWith(pattern)) return opts;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Middleware Factory ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Create the CORS middleware.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {object} [opts][39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.additionalDomains]   - Extra allowed first-party domains[39m
[31m+  * @param {boolean}  [opts.allowLocalhost]       - Allow localhost (default: NODE_ENV !== 'production')[39m
[31m+  * @param {CORSRouteRegistry} [opts.routeRegistry] - Per-route override registry[39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.allowedHeaders]       - Override allowed request headers[39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.exposedHeaders]       - Override exposed response headers[39m
[31m+  * @param {number}   [opts.maxAge]               - Preflight cache max-age (default: 86400)[39m
[31m+  * @returns {Function} Express middleware[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function corsPolicy(opts = {}) {[39m
[31m+   const {[39m
[31m+     additionalDomains = [],[39m
[31m+     allowLocalhost = process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production',[39m
[31m+     routeRegistry = new CORSRouteRegistry(),[39m
[31m+     allowedHeaders = ALLOWED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+     exposedHeaders = EXPOSED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+     maxAge = PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE[39m
[31m+   } = opts;[39m
[31m+   const allowedHeadersStr = allowedHeaders.join(', ');[39m
[31m+   const exposedHeadersStr = exposedHeaders.join(', ');[39m
[31m+   const allowedMethodsStr = ALLOWED_METHODS.join(', ');[39m
[31m+   return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+     const origin = req.headers.origin;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // No origin header → likely same-origin or non-browser → allow[39m
[31m+     if (!origin) return next();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Check for route-level override[39m
[31m+     const routeOverride = routeRegistry.find(req.path);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Handle public API (no credentials)[39m
[31m+     if (routeOverride?.allowAll) {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', _isHeadyOrigin(req.headers.origin) ? req.headers.origin : 'null');[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', (routeOverride.methods || ALLOWED_METHODS).join(', '));[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', allowedHeadersStr);[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', (routeOverride.exposedHeaders || exposedHeaders).join(', '));[39m
[31m+       if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+         res.set('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(maxAge));[39m
[31m+         return res.status(204).end();[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       return next();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Validate origin[39m
[31m+     const {[39m
[31m+       allowed,[39m
[31m+       credentials,[39m
[31m+       matchedDomain[39m
[31m+     } = validateOrigin(origin, {[39m
[31m+       additionalDomains,[39m
[31m+       allowLocalhost[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     if (!allowed) {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn('[CORS] Blocked origin:', origin, 'path:', req.path);[39m
[31m+       if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+         return res.status(403).json({[39m
[31m+           error: 'CORS: Origin not allowed',[39m
[31m+           origin[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       // For non-preflight, don't set CORS headers (browser will block it)[39m
[31m+       return next();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Compute effective credentials flag[39m
[31m+     const effectiveCredentials = routeOverride?.credentials !== undefined ? routeOverride.credentials : credentials;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Compute effective methods[39m
[31m+     const effectiveMethods = routeOverride?.methods || ALLOWED_METHODS;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Compute effective additional exposed headers[39m
[31m+     const effectiveExposedHeaders = [...exposedHeaders, ...(routeOverride?.exposedHeaders || [])];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Set CORS headers[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', origin);[39m
[31m+     res.set('Vary', 'Origin'); // Must vary cache by Origin[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     if (effectiveCredentials) {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Credentials', 'true');[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', effectiveMethods.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', allowedHeadersStr);[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', effectiveExposedHeaders.join(', '));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Handle preflight[39m
[31m+     if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(maxAge));[39m
[31m+       return res.status(204).end();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     next();[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Route Override Shortcuts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Middleware to allow all origins on a specific route (public API — no credentials).[39m
[31m+  * Use for webhook endpoints, public data APIs, etc.[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function publicCors(methods = ['GET', 'POST']) {[39m
[31m+   return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', _isHeadyOrigin(req.headers.origin) ? req.headers.origin : 'null');[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', methods.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', ALLOWED_HEADERS.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', EXPOSED_HEADERS.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE));[39m
[31m+       return res.status(204).end();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     next();[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Middleware that blocks all cross-origin requests (for internal-only APIs).[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function noCors() {[39m
[31m+   return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+     if (req.headers.origin) {[39m
[31m+       return res.status(403).json({[39m
[31m+         error: 'Cross-origin requests not allowed for this endpoint'[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     next();[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Exports ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ module.exports = {[39m
[31m+   corsPolicy,[39m
[31m+   publicCors,[39m
[31m+   noCors,[39m
[31m+   validateOrigin,[39m
[31m+   CORSRouteRegistry,[39m
[31m+   FIRST_PARTY_DOMAINS,[39m
[31m+   ALLOWED_METHODS,[39m
[31m+   ALLOWED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+   EXPOSED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+   PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE[39m
[31m+ };[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Usage Example ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ /*[39m
[31m+ const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+ const { corsPolicy, publicCors, noCors, CORSRouteRegistry } = require('./cors-policy');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ const app = express();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Per-route registry[39m
[31m+ const routeRegistry = new CORSRouteRegistry()[39m
[31m+   .register('/api/public/', { allowAll: true })[39m
[31m+   .register('/api/webhooks/', { allowAll: true, methods: ['POST'] })[39m
[31m+   .register('/api/v1/admin/', { credentials: true })  // enforce first-party only[39m
[31m+   .register(/^\/embed\//, { origins: ['https://partner.example.com'], credentials: false });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Apply globally[39m
[31m+ app.use(corsPolicy({[39m
[31m+   allowLocalhost:   process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production',[39m
[31m+   routeRegistry,[39m
[31m+ }));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Override on specific routes[39m
[31m+ app.get('/api/public/status', publicCors(['GET']), (req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }));[39m
[31m+ app.post('/internal/admin', noCors(), (req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }));[39m
[31m+ */[39m

[31m+  * Features:[39m

[31m+ // ─── HEADY CORS WHITELIST ────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ const HEADY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS = new Set(['https://headyme.com', 'https://headysystems.com', 'https://headyconnection.org', 'https://headyconnection.com', 'https://headybuddy.org', 'https://headymcp.com', 'https://headyapi.com', 'https://headyio.com', 'https://headyos.com', 'https://headyweb.com', 'https://headybot.com', 'https://headycloud.com', 'https://headybee.co', 'https://heady-ai.com', 'https://headyex.com', 'https://headyfinance.com', 'https://admin.headysystems.com', 'https://auth.headysystems.com', 'https://api.headysystems.com']);[39m
[31m+ const _isHeadyOrigin = o => !o ? false : HEADY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.has(o) || /\.run\.app$/.test(o) || process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && /^https?:\/\/(localhost|127\.0\.0\.1):/.test(o);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Allowed Origins ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // All HeadyMe first-party domains — credentials: true is safe for these[39m
[31m+ const FIRST_PARTY_DOMAINS = ['headyme.com', 'headysystems.com', 'headymcp.com', 'headybuddy.org', 'headyconnection.org', 'headyapi.com', 'headybot.com', 'headyos.com', 'headyio.com'];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Third-party domains — allowed but no credentials[39m
[31m+ const THIRD_PARTY_DOMAINS = [[39m
[31m+   // Add partner/integration domains here[39m
[31m+ ];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Allowed HTTP methods[39m
[31m+ const ALLOWED_METHODS = ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH', 'OPTIONS', 'HEAD'];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Exposed response headers[39m
[31m+ const EXPOSED_HEADERS = ['X-Request-ID', 'X-RateLimit-Remaining', 'X-RateLimit-Limit', 'X-RateLimit-Reset', 'X-Circuit-State', 'X-Processing-Purpose', 'X-Legal-Basis', 'X-Session-Expires-In', 'Content-Disposition', 'X-Checksum-SHA256'];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Allowed request headers[39m
[31m+ const ALLOWED_HEADERS = ['Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'X-Request-ID', 'X-Session-ID', 'X-API-Key', 'X-Tenant-ID', 'X-Access-Purpose', 'X-Data-Destination-Country', 'Accept', 'Accept-Language', 'Cache-Control', 'If-None-Match', 'If-Modified-Since'];[39m
[31m+ const PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE = 86400; // 24 hours[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Origin Validator ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Determine if an origin is allowed and whether credentials should be permitted.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {string} origin[39m
[31m+  * @param {object} opts[39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.additionalDomains] - Extra allowed domains[39m
[31m+  * @param {boolean} [opts.allowLocalhost]     - Allow localhost/0.0.0.0 (dev)[39m
[31m+  * @returns {{ allowed: boolean, credentials: boolean, matchedDomain: string|null }}[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function validateOrigin(origin, opts = {}) {[39m
[31m+   if (!origin) return {[39m
[31m+     allowed: false,[39m
[31m+     credentials: false,[39m
[31m+     matchedDomain: null[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+   let hostname;[39m
[31m+   try {[39m
[31m+     hostname = new URL(origin).hostname;[39m
[31m+   } catch {[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       allowed: false,[39m
[31m+       credentials: false,[39m
[31m+       matchedDomain: null[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // Dev: allow localhost[39m
[31m+   if (opts.allowLocalhost && (hostname === "0.0.0.0" || hostname === process.env.REMOTE_HOST || '0.0.0.0' || hostname.endsWith('.local'))) {[39m
[31m+     return {[39m
[31m+       allowed: true,[39m
[31m+       credentials: true,[39m
[31m+       matchedDomain: hostname[39m
[31m+     };[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // First-party domains (exact + subdomain match)[39m
[31m+   for (const domain of FIRST_PARTY_DOMAINS) {[39m
[31m+     if (hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)) {[39m
[31m+       return {[39m
[31m+         allowed: true,[39m
[31m+         credentials: true,[39m
[31m+         matchedDomain: domain[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // Additional first-party domains from config[39m
[31m+   for (const domain of opts.additionalDomains || []) {[39m
[31m+     if (hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)) {[39m
[31m+       return {[39m
[31m+         allowed: true,[39m
[31m+         credentials: true,[39m
[31m+         matchedDomain: domain[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   // Third-party domains (no credentials)[39m
[31m+   for (const domain of THIRD_PARTY_DOMAINS) {[39m
[31m+     if (hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)) {[39m
[31m+       return {[39m
[31m+         allowed: true,[39m
[31m+         credentials: false,[39m
[31m+         matchedDomain: domain[39m
[31m+       };[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+   return {[39m
[31m+     allowed: false,[39m
[31m+     credentials: false,[39m
[31m+     matchedDomain: null[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Route-Level Override Registry ───────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ class CORSRouteRegistry {[39m
[31m+   constructor() {[39m
[31m+     this._routes = new Map(); // pattern → options[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Register per-route CORS override.[39m
[31m+    *[39m
[31m+    * @param {string|RegExp} pattern    - Route path or regex[39m
[31m+    * @param {object} corsOptions       - Per-route CORS options[39m
[31m+    * @param {string[]} [corsOptions.origins]       - Additional allowed origins[39m
[31m+    * @param {string[]} [corsOptions.methods]       - Override allowed methods[39m
[31m+    * @param {boolean}  [corsOptions.credentials]  - Override credentials flag[39m
[31m+    * @param {string[]} [corsOptions.exposedHeaders] - Additional exposed headers[39m
[31m+    * @param {boolean}  [corsOptions.allowAll]      - Allow * (public API, no credentials)[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   register(pattern, corsOptions) {[39m
[31m+     this._routes.set(pattern, corsOptions);[39m
[31m+     return this;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+   /**[39m
[31m+    * Find override matching a path.[39m
[31m+    * @param {string} path[39m
[31m+    * @returns {object|null}[39m
[31m+    */[39m
[31m+   find(path) {[39m
[31m+     for (const [pattern, opts] of this._routes) {[39m
[31m+       if (pattern instanceof RegExp) {[39m
[31m+         if (pattern.test(path)) return opts;[39m
[31m+       } else if (typeof pattern === 'string') {[39m
[31m+         if (path === pattern || path.startsWith(pattern)) return opts;[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     return null;[39m
[31m+   }[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Middleware Factory ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Create the CORS middleware.[39m
[31m+  *[39m
[31m+  * @param {object} [opts][39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.additionalDomains]   - Extra allowed first-party domains[39m
[31m+  * @param {boolean}  [opts.allowLocalhost]       - Allow localhost (default: NODE_ENV !== 'production')[39m
[31m+  * @param {CORSRouteRegistry} [opts.routeRegistry] - Per-route override registry[39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.allowedHeaders]       - Override allowed request headers[39m
[31m+  * @param {string[]} [opts.exposedHeaders]       - Override exposed response headers[39m
[31m+  * @param {number}   [opts.maxAge]               - Preflight cache max-age (default: 86400)[39m
[31m+  * @returns {Function} Express middleware[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function corsPolicy(opts = {}) {[39m
[31m+   const {[39m
[31m+     additionalDomains = [],[39m
[31m+     allowLocalhost = process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production',[39m
[31m+     routeRegistry = new CORSRouteRegistry(),[39m
[31m+     allowedHeaders = ALLOWED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+     exposedHeaders = EXPOSED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+     maxAge = PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE[39m
[31m+   } = opts;[39m
[31m+   const allowedHeadersStr = allowedHeaders.join(', ');[39m
[31m+   const exposedHeadersStr = exposedHeaders.join(', ');[39m
[31m+   const allowedMethodsStr = ALLOWED_METHODS.join(', ');[39m
[31m+   return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+     const origin = req.headers.origin;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // No origin header → likely same-origin or non-browser → allow[39m
[31m+     if (!origin) return next();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Check for route-level override[39m
[31m+     const routeOverride = routeRegistry.find(req.path);[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Handle public API (no credentials)[39m
[31m+     if (routeOverride?.allowAll) {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', _isHeadyOrigin(req.headers.origin) ? req.headers.origin : 'null');[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', (routeOverride.methods || ALLOWED_METHODS).join(', '));[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', allowedHeadersStr);[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', (routeOverride.exposedHeaders || exposedHeaders).join(', '));[39m
[31m+       if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+         res.set('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(maxAge));[39m
[31m+         return res.status(204).end();[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       return next();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Validate origin[39m
[31m+     const {[39m
[31m+       allowed,[39m
[31m+       credentials,[39m
[31m+       matchedDomain[39m
[31m+     } = validateOrigin(origin, {[39m
[31m+       additionalDomains,[39m
[31m+       allowLocalhost[39m
[31m+     });[39m
[31m+     if (!allowed) {[39m
[31m+       logger.warn('[CORS] Blocked origin:', origin, 'path:', req.path);[39m
[31m+       if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+         return res.status(403).json({[39m
[31m+           error: 'CORS: Origin not allowed',[39m
[31m+           origin[39m
[31m+         });[39m
[31m+       }[39m
[31m+       // For non-preflight, don't set CORS headers (browser will block it)[39m
[31m+       return next();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Compute effective credentials flag[39m
[31m+     const effectiveCredentials = routeOverride?.credentials !== undefined ? routeOverride.credentials : credentials;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Compute effective methods[39m
[31m+     const effectiveMethods = routeOverride?.methods || ALLOWED_METHODS;[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Compute effective additional exposed headers[39m
[31m+     const effectiveExposedHeaders = [...exposedHeaders, ...(routeOverride?.exposedHeaders || [])];[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Set CORS headers[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', origin);[39m
[31m+     res.set('Vary', 'Origin'); // Must vary cache by Origin[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     if (effectiveCredentials) {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Credentials', 'true');[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', effectiveMethods.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', allowedHeadersStr);[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', effectiveExposedHeaders.join(', '));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+     // Handle preflight[39m
[31m+     if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(maxAge));[39m
[31m+       return res.status(204).end();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     next();[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Route Override Shortcuts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Middleware to allow all origins on a specific route (public API — no credentials).[39m
[31m+  * Use for webhook endpoints, public data APIs, etc.[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function publicCors(methods = ['GET', 'POST']) {[39m
[31m+   return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', _isHeadyOrigin(req.headers.origin) ? req.headers.origin : 'null');[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', methods.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', ALLOWED_HEADERS.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     res.set('Access-Control-Expose-Headers', EXPOSED_HEADERS.join(', '));[39m
[31m+     if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {[39m
[31m+       res.set('Access-Control-Max-Age', String(PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE));[39m
[31m+       return res.status(204).end();[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     next();[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ /**[39m
[31m+  * Middleware that blocks all cross-origin requests (for internal-only APIs).[39m
[31m+  */[39m
[31m+ function noCors() {[39m
[31m+   return (req, res, next) => {[39m
[31m+     if (req.headers.origin) {[39m
[31m+       return res.status(403).json({[39m
[31m+         error: 'Cross-origin requests not allowed for this endpoint'[39m
[31m+       });[39m
[31m+     }[39m
[31m+     next();[39m
[31m+   };[39m
[31m+ }[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Exports ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ module.exports = {[39m
[31m+   corsPolicy,[39m
[31m+   publicCors,[39m
[31m+   noCors,[39m
[31m+   validateOrigin,[39m
[31m+   CORSRouteRegistry,[39m
[31m+   FIRST_PARTY_DOMAINS,[39m
[31m+   ALLOWED_METHODS,[39m
[31m+   ALLOWED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+   EXPOSED_HEADERS,[39m
[31m+   PREFLIGHT_MAX_AGE[39m
[31m+ };[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Usage Example ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[31m+ /*[39m
[31m+ const express = require('express');[39m
[31m+ const { corsPolicy, publicCors, noCors, CORSRouteRegistry } = require('./cors-policy');[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ const app = express();[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Per-route registry[39m
[31m+ const routeRegistry = new CORSRouteRegistry()[39m
[31m+   .register('/api/public/', { allowAll: true })[39m
[31m+   .register('/api/webhooks/', { allowAll: true, methods: ['POST'] })[39m
[31m+   .register('/api/v1/admin/', { credentials: true })  // enforce first-party only[39m
[31m+   .register(/^\/embed\//, { origins: ['https://partner.example.com'], credentials: false });[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Apply globally[39m
[31m+ app.use(corsPolicy({[39m
[31m+   allowLocalhost:   process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production',[39m
[31m+   routeRegistry,[39m
[31m+ }));[39m
[31m+[39m
[31m+ // Override on specific routes[39m
[31m+ app.get('/api/public/status', publicCors(['GET']), (req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }));[39m
[31m+ app.post('/internal/admin', noCors(), (req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }));[39m
[31m+ */[39m

[31m+[39m
[31m+ // ─── Allowed Origins ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
